quotes.text: (With emphasis:) In a matter of speaking (underlined), the birds and the insects are indeed living portions of the earth flying, even as, again in a matter of speaking (in parentheses) (with a smile and again with an emphasis upon the word "matter"), bears and wolves and cows and cats represent the earth turning itself into creatures that live upon its own surface. And in a matter of speaking, again, man becomes the earth thinking, and thinking his own thoughts, man in his way specializes in the conscious work of the world--a work that is dependent upon the indispensable "unconscious" work of the rest of nature, a nature that sustains him (all very intently). And when he thinks, man thinks for the microbes, for the atoms and the molecules, for the smallest particles within his being, for the insects and for the rocks, for the creatures of the sky and the air and the oceans.
quotes.translation: （强调地说：）可以说（下划线），鸟类和昆虫确实是地球飞翔的活生生部分，正如同样可以说（括号内）（微笑着再次强调"物质"一词），熊、狼、牛和猫代表地球将自己转化为生活在其表面的造物。同样可以说，人类成为地球在思考，思考自己的思想，人类以他的方式专精于世界的有意识工作——一项依赖于自然其余部分不可或缺的"无意识"工作的工作，自然支撑着他（全神贯注地说）。当人类思考时，他为微生物思考，为原子和分子思考，为他存在中最微小的粒子思考，为昆虫和岩石思考，为天空、空气和海洋中的造物思考。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Man does have an instinct and a desire to live, and he has an instinct and a desire to die. The same applies to other creatures. In his life [each] man is embarked upon a cooperative venture with his own species, and with the other species, and dying he also in that regard acts in a cooperative manner, returning his physical substance to the earth. (Pause.) Physically speaking, man's "purpose" is to help enrich the quality of existence in all of its dimensions. Spiritually speaking, his "purpose" is to understand the qualities of love and creativity, to intellectually and psychically understand the sources of his being, and to lovingly create other dimensions of reality of which he is presently unaware. (Pause.) In his thinking, in the quality of his thoughts, in their motion, he is indeed experimenting with a unique and a new kind of reality, forming other subjective worlds which will in their turn grow into consciousness and song, which will in their turn flower from a dream dimension into other ones. Man is learning to create new worlds. In order to do so he has taken on many challenges.
quotes.translation: 人类确实有生存的本能和欲望，也有死亡的本能和欲望。这同样适用于其他造物。在生命中，（每个）人都踏上了与自己物种及其他物种的合作冒险之旅，而在死亡时，他在这方面也以合作方式行动，将他的物质身体归还给地球。（停顿。）从物质层面来说，人类的"目的"是帮助丰富所有维度的存在品质。从灵性层面来说，他的"目的"是理解爱与创造力的品质，在智识和心灵上理解他存在的源头，并充满爱地创造他目前尚未意识到的其他实相维度。（停顿。）在他的思考中，在他思想的质量中，在它们的运动中，他确实在实验一种独特而崭新的实相，形成其他主观世界，这些世界将依次成长为意识和歌声，将依次从梦境维度绽放成其他维度。人类正在学习创造新世界。为了做到这一点，他承担了许多挑战。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Through the centuries philosophical and religious thinkers have created numerous complicated variations of ideas involving free will and determinism, so that neither thesis is as simple as it first appears to be. Man related the concept of free will long ago to the question of whether he could deliberately choose evil, for example. He still does. And he still struggles with questions about his freedom before God's omnipotence and foreknowledge, and whether those qualities cause events, or can cause them, and whether they involve predestination. Opposing determinism is the idea that man has always fought for his personal responsibility--that instead of being controlled entirely by his heritage, he's capable of forming new syntheses of thought and action based upon the complicated patterns of his own history.
quotes.translation: 几个世纪以来，哲学和宗教思想家们创造了无数关于自由意志和决定论的复杂变体观念，以至于这两种论点都不像最初看起来那么简单。例如，人类很久以前就将自由意志的概念与他是否能故意选择邪恶的问题联系起来。他至今仍如此。他仍在挣扎于关于他在上帝的全能和预知面前的自由的问题，以及这些品质是否导致事件、或能否导致事件，以及它们是否涉及预定论的问题。与决定论相对立的是这样一种观念：人类一直在为自己的个人责任而奋斗——即他并非完全受遗传控制，而是能够基于自己历史的复杂模式形成思想和行动的新综合。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Those "properties" are the faculties of the imagination, creativity, telepathy, clairvoyance, and dreaming, as well as the functions of logic and reason. You know that you dream. You know that you think. Those are direct experiences. (Pause.) Anytime you use instruments to probe into the nature of reality, you are looking at a kind of secondary evidence, no matter how excellent the instruments may be. The subjective evidence of dreaming, for example, is far more "convincing" and irrefutable than is the evidence for an expanding universe, black holes, or even atoms and molecules themselves. Although instruments can indeed be most advantageous in many ways, they still present you with secondary rather than primary tools of investigation--and they distort the nature of reality far more than the subjective attributes of thoughts, feelings, and intuitions do.
quotes.translation: 这些“属性”包括想象力、创造力、心灵感应、千里眼、做梦的能力，以及逻辑和理性的功能。你知道自己会做梦。你知道自己会思考。这些都是直接体验。（停顿）每当你使用仪器探究实相的本质时，无论仪器多么精良，你看到的都是一种次级证据。例如，做梦的主观证据远比膨胀宇宙、黑洞甚至原子和分子本身的证据更“令人信服”且无可辩驳。尽管仪器在许多方面确实极为有利，但它们呈现给你的仍是次级而非主要的探究工具——而且它们对实相本质的扭曲程度，远大于思想、情感和直觉的主观属性。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have told you that you create your dreams, in actuality, not in theory alone. You create an actuality, a dream universe, as real as the physical universe. It simply cannot be directly perceived within the physical universe. There is always interaction. You can perceive the dream experience, you can receive its particular intensities, because you have created the dream experience within the universe of those intensities. But the dream universe and the dream experience, like thoughts and emotions, are independent of you in existence. You influence the dream universe but you cannot stop a dream experience after you have created it, and you must create it within the small range of intensities available for its existence, for there are no other conditions or agreeable ranges of intensity within which the dream experience can exist.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你，你实际上创造了你的梦，而不仅仅在理论上。你创造了一个实相，一个梦的宇宙，与物质宇宙一样真实。它只是无法在物质宇宙中被直接感知。两者之间总有互动。你可以感知到梦的体验，可以接收到它特定的强度，因为你是在那些强度的宇宙中创造了梦的体验。但梦的宇宙和梦的体验，就像思想和情感一样，在存在上独立于你。你影响梦的宇宙，但一旦创造了梦的体验，你就无法停止它，而且你必须在它存在所允许的狭小强度范围内创造它，因为没有其他条件或合适的强度范围能让梦的体验存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: （Then I was looking at Bill, off to my left. He was too close to the edge of the porch roof. I hollered at him to be careful. Even as I did he slipped, landed on his backside, then tumbled over the edge as he scrambled for his balance. I heard him hit the ground with such force that I was very afraid he had broken a limb. I then looked over the edge of the roof, and to my great agitation I saw that Dick had not only fallen off the roof and hit the ground hard, but that now he had slipped over the edge of a steep cliff beside the porch, and was saving himself only by grasping a skinny little shrub that was in the process of loosening in the frozen ground. At the same time, Bill looked up at me and I thought he was smiling; or at least he didn't appear to be worried.
quotes.translation: （然后我看着左边的比尔。他离门廊屋顶的边缘太近了。我大声喊他小心。就在我喊的时候，他滑倒了，摔了个屁股蹲儿，然后在挣扎着保持平衡时滚下了边缘。我听到他重重地摔在地上，非常担心他摔断了手脚。然后我看向屋顶边缘，令我极度不安的是，我不仅看到迪克摔下了屋顶、重重落地，而且他现在滑到了门廊旁边陡峭悬崖的边缘，只能抓住一株正在冻土中松动的小灌木来救自己。与此同时，比尔抬头看着我，我以为他在笑；或者至少他看起来并不担心。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now there is a reason why these lessons must be learned in just this way. Elementally there is only creativity. Destruction is merely the changing of form. A cloudburst or a tornado knows nothing of destruction. This same energy encased within a human form is something else. There are different kinds of creativity, then, to learn, and a specialization in energy is focus and feelings that emerge; elemental energy becoming conscious of itself, and aware of issues that did not exist for it earlier; millions of molecules momentarily united with the living consciousness (Pause), filled with primal energy, now learning love, and forming highly sensitive psychic patterns, electrical charges that now form emotions instead of clouds; the innocent chaos of undifferentiated personality that exists behind the highly specified and truly sophisticated mechanism of one thought. And all of this before an individual is born within your system. In terms of time this is behind us all.
quotes.translation: 这些课程必须以这种方式学习是有原因的。从根本上看，只有创造力。毁灭只是形式的改变。一场暴雨或龙卷风对毁灭一无所知。同样的能量被包裹在人类形态中，就变成了别的东西。因此，需要学习不同种类的创造力，而能量的专门化就是焦点和浮现的情感；原初能量开始意识到自身，并意识到之前对它不存在的议题；数百万个分子暂时与活生生的意识结合（停顿），充满原初能量，现在在学习爱，并形成高度敏感的心灵模式，形成情感而非云朵的电荷；在高度特定且真正复杂的一个思想机制背后，存在着未分化人格的天真混沌。而这一切都发生在一个个体在你的系统中诞生之前。从时间角度看，这在我们所有人背后。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Those in your system are relatively impatient, have decided to work with large amounts of energy. Your physical system itself rapidly responds and mirrors the use of this energy. Results are seen quickly. Large groupings and regroupings occur within the mass psyche, huge waves of energy as the race makes important decisions. All of this is done on an unconscious basis, but as a teaching method the results must be seen physically. Because you respond as physical creatures you respond best of all to tangible physical results. You do not know how far you can go in any given waves of activity until you see it objectified, or nearly so. If you knew how to handle energy effectively, if you fully realized that your thoughts were the motivating factor, were the realities, then you would not need a physical existence, for that is the reason for the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你们系统中的人相对急躁，决定处理大量能量。你们的物质系统本身会迅速响应并反映这种能量的使用。结果很快就能看到。在集体心灵中发生着大规模的聚合与重组，当种族做出重要决定时，会涌现巨大的能量波。这一切都在无意识基础上进行，但作为一种教学方法，结果必须在物质层面被看到。因为你们作为物质生物而回应，你们对具体的物质结果反应最好。在任何一个特定的活动浪潮中，你们不知道能走多远，直到你们看到它被客观化，或近乎如此。如果你们知道如何有效处理能量，如果你们完全认识到你们的思想是驱动因素、是实相，那么你们就不需要物质存在了，因为这就是物质环境存在的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, you see what you are willing to see, and it is stupidity to consider suggestion as the result or the cause of what you see. It is stupidity in class to worry that suggestion would cause a given result... for suggestion causes whatever you see. You form your physical reality through suggestion and expectation. You experience what you expect to experience at a subconscious and a conscious level. And therefore as Ruburt is very careful that suggestion is not involved, so he has also had you be overly cautious, and there have been many opportunities in class that you have missed for this reason... and these are the bets that I have spoken about earlier this evening. You have the ability to see more than you saw, and you have the ability. You enjoyed your passivity (to CW) to the point of a joyous giving-up; and instead, you see, there is a point within passivity where you are passively alert. And you went beyond the point and lost what you might have seen. As our friend here went beyond the point (referring to TM), looked at the portraits and consciously... for you did not make an original intuitive judgment... but consciously looked at those portraits in terms of nationality, age, and all the requirements that you thought of.
quotes.translation: 现在，你只看到你愿意看到的，把暗示视为你所见的结果或原因是愚蠢的。在课堂上担心暗示会导致特定结果是愚蠢的……因为暗示导致你所看到的一切。你通过暗示和期望形成你的物质实相。你在潜意识和意识层面体验你所期望体验的。因此，正如鲁柏非常小心地避免暗示介入，他也让你们过于谨慎，为此你们错过了课堂上许多机会……这就是我今晚早些时候提到的那些赌注。你有能力看到比你实际看到的更多，你确实有这个能力。你享受你的被动（对CW说）到了愉快放弃的地步；然而，你看，在被动中有一个点，在那里你是被动警觉的。而你越过了那个点，失去了你本可能看到的东西。就像我们这位朋友（指TM）越过了那个点，看着那些画像并刻意地……因为你没有做出原初的直觉判断……而是刻意地根据国籍、年龄以及你想到的所有要求来看那些画像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: An individual will therefore feel more at home operating within certain frequencies, and he will feel less at home with others. The original thought is used as a pattern, therefore, for the creation of a new electrical reality, which may or may not be directed at any given receiver. It is obvious that the attempt to duplicate is present; and were it not for this attempt to duplicate, then there would be little similarity between any separate identities.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体在某些频率范围内运作时会感到更自在，而在其他频率中则会感到不那么自在。原始思想被用作模式，从而创造一种新的电性实相，这种实相可能指向也可能不指向任何特定的接收者。显然，复制意图是存在的；若非这种复制意图，不同个体之间便几乎不会有相似之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. Some females will identify in the dream with the bull. In dreams many females will have what you would call male reactions. Some males in dreams will have what you would call female reactions. The bull could come also to represent a person the dreamer considers bullheaded. A bullfighting dream might be formed. The variations are endless. Some generic images will have strong personal significance because of past life experiences. The generic image does not only color the dream state, however. These images are the first basis from which thought evolved. This would almost amount to a cellular thinking process, but it is actually a gestalt of relatedness in which cellular comprehension was, and is, passed throughout the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 现在。有些女性会在梦中与公牛认同。在梦中，许多女性会有你们所谓的男性反应。有些男性在梦中会有你们所谓的女性反应。公牛也可能代表做梦者认为固执的人。可能会形成斗牛梦。变化无穷无尽。由于过去生活的经历，某些通用意象会具有强烈的个人意义。然而，通用意象不仅为梦境状态着色。这些意象是思想演化的最初基础。这几乎相当于一种细胞思维过程，但实际上它是一种关联性的完形，细胞的理解曾经并正在通过整个物质有机体传递。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: First of all, let us consider the fact just mentioned. There is no separate, indivisible, specific point of death. Life is a state of becoming, and death is a part of this process of becoming. You are alive now, a consciousness knowing itself, sparkling with cognition amid a debris of dead and dying cells; alive while the atoms and molecules of your body die and are reborn. You are alive, therefore, in the midst of small deaths; portions of your own image crumble away moment by moment and are replaced, and you scarcely give the matter a thought. So you are to some extent now alive in the midst of the death of yourself -- alive despite, and yet because of, the multitudinous deaths and rebirths that occur within your body in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 首先，让我们考虑刚才提到的事实。没有分离、不可分割、特定的死亡点。生命是一种生成的状态，死亡是这生成过程的一部分。你现在活着，是一个认识自身的意识，在死亡和垂死的细胞碎片中闪烁着认知；当你身体的原子和分子死亡并重生时，你依然活着。因此，你活在众多小死亡之中；你自身形象的某些部分时刻崩解并被替换，而你几乎对此毫不在意。所以，在某种程度上，你现在活在你自身的死亡之中——尽管、却也正是因为，在物质层面上，你体内发生的无数死亡与重生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you think of thoughts as mental and viruses as physical, the question is understandable. It is not just that thoughts influence the body, as of course they do; but each one of them represents a triggering stimulus, bringing about hormonal changes and altering the entire physical situation at any given time.
quotes.translation: 当你们把思想视为心智的、病毒视为物质的时，这个问题是可以理解的。不仅仅是思想影响身体——它们当然会——而且每一个思想都代表一种触发刺激，引起荷尔蒙变化，并在任何特定时刻改变整个物质状况。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 841, MARCH 14, 1979
9:08 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Such personalities try to affect the feelings and thoughts of a civilization, for these thoughts and feelings will alone bring about events. Personalities may be born within your system and find that it does not challenge them, or it is not to their liking in any case. (Pause.) Give us a moment on this. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这类人格试图影响一个文明的感受和思想，因为只有这些思想和感受才能带来事件。人格可能出生在你们的系统内，却发现它无法挑战他们，或者无论如何都不合他们的意。（停顿。）让我们在此稍作停留。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Platonic thought saw this inner world as perfect.4 As you think of it, however, perfection always suggests something done and finished, or beyond surpassing, and this of course denies the inherent characteristics of creativity, which do indeed always seek to surpass themselves. The Platonic, idealized inner world would ultimately result in a dead one, for in it the models for all exteriorizations were seen as already completed -- finished and perfect.
quotes.translation: 柏拉图思想视这个内在世界为完美的。然而，正如你们所想，完美总是暗示着已完成或已结束、或无法超越的事物，这当然否定了创造力的固有特性，而创造力确实总是寻求超越自身。柏拉图式的理想化内在世界最终会导致一个死寂的世界，因为其中所有外显的模型都被视为已经完成——完美且终结。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 696
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Thoughts have what you may term color and shape, as well as electromagnetic structure and intensity. These combining together form your physical image, in your terms. Action can never be broken down to a prime or original unit, for it automatically builds upon itself, and can never be, therefore, subtracted from. Nor can it be isolated. It is within all things that you see, and invisible because it makes up the appearance of any physical construction.
quotes.translation: 思想具有你们所谓的颜色和形状，以及电磁结构和强度。这些结合在一起，用你们的话说，形成了你们的物质形象。行动永远无法被分解为最初的或原始的单位，因为它会自动建立在自身之上，因此永远无法被减去，也无法被孤立。它存在于你们所见的一切事物之中，并且因为构成了任何物质构造的外表而不可见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: If you have thought that the universe followed a mechanistic model, then you would have to say that each portion of this "cosmic machine" created itself, knowing its position in the entire "future construction." You would have to say further that each portion came gladly out of its own source individually, neatly tailored to its position, while at the same time that individual source was also as intimately the source of each other individual portion.
quotes.translation: 如果你们认为宇宙遵循机械模型，那么你们就不得不说，这台“宇宙机器”的每一部分都创造了自身，并知道自己在整个“未来构造”中的位置。你们还必须进一步说，每一部分都欣然从各自的源头中诞生，精确地适应其位置，而同时，那个个体源头也同样亲密地是其他每个个体部分的源头。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not a physical personality. Basically, however, neither are you. Your experience now is physical. You are a creator translating your expectations into physical form. The world is meant to serve as a reference point. The exterior appearance is a replica of inner desire. You can change your personal world. You do change it without knowing it. You have only to use your ability consciously, to examine the nature of your thoughts and feelings and project those with which you basically agree.
quotes.translation: 我不是一个物质人格。然而，从根本上说，你们也不是。你们现在的经验是物质的。你们是创造者，将你们的期望转化为物质形式。世界旨在作为一个参考点。外在表象是内在欲望的复制品。你们可以改变你们的个人世界。你们确实在不知不觉中改变它。你们只需有意识地运用你们的能力，审视你们思想和情感的本质，并投射那些你们基本认同的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: New paragraph: Consciousness then is not dependent upon physical perception, though this attribute does require an awareness immersed within a material form. While physical consciousness is sifted through the bodily apparatus, you are usually unaware of noncorporeal kinds because of that process. The general framework, properties and characteristics of the body exist, therefore, before its formation. In simple terms, you choose ahead of time the kind of body you will inhabit and impress. It may seem to you that you do not have any conscious control over your body's condition in life as you know it, much less before your birth. You have been taught that there is little connection between your thought and your body's activities.
quotes.translation: 新段落：因此，意识并不依赖于物质感知，尽管这一属性确实需要一种沉浸于物质形态中的觉知。当物质意识通过身体器官被筛选时，你们通常由于这一过程而无法察觉非肉体的意识种类。因此，身体的一般框架、属性和特征在其形成之前就已存在。简单来说，你们提前选择了你们将居住和印记的身体类型。在你们所知的生命中，你们可能觉得自己对身体状况没有任何有意识的控制，更不用说在出生之前了。你们一直被教导，你们的思想与身体活动之间几乎没有联系。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They follow the law of value fulfillment, which on your plane is thought of as growth. But the growth, so-called, is not of itself a property of matter, in that the same matter does not grow, but energy completely forms the pattern ever anew, as far as the particular strength of the energy itself can carry it, and knowing the limitations and capacities of the pattern which it has formed. To some extent the image or physical pattern ultimately blurs.
quotes.translation: 它们遵循价值完成法则，在你们的层面上，这被视为成长。但所谓的成长本身并非物质的属性，因为同样的物质并不会成长，而是能量完全地、不断地重新形成模式，直到能量本身的特定强度所能承载的极限，并且知道它所形成的模式的局限性和能力。在某种程度上，形象或物质模式最终会模糊。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Some systems are far heavier or lighter than your own, though this may not involve weight in the terms with which you are familiar. Probable actions emerge, then, into matter-systems quite as valid as your own, and quite as consistent. You are used to thinking in single-line thoughts, so you think of events that you know as complete things or actions, not realizing that what you perceive is but a fraction of their entire multidimensional existence.
quotes.translation: 有些系统比你们的系统重得多或轻得多，尽管这可能不涉及你们所熟悉的重量概念。因此，可能的行动会进入与你们自己的系统同样有效且同样一致的物质系统中。你们习惯于以线性思维思考，所以你们将你们所知道的事件视为完整的事物或行动，而没有意识到你们所感知到的只是它们整个多维存在的一小部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时间旅行者会愿意放弃当前的心智与身体焦点，完全进入一个更早的人格吗？我认为在绝大多数情况下不会——或许永远不会——因为从那些角度而言，这意味着放弃整体自性或存有的一部分，而这部分通过投射进入我们"当下"时间的架构，已获得了某种独特程度的意识与物质形态。然而转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种离奇发展的可能性。或许这样的转移确实能在可能性实相的广阔领域（我将在本文中讨论）中发生。若果真如此，那么它们只是从我们有限的视角看来显得怪异罢了。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Some individuals can with ease and exuberance imagine themselves in a fistfight, a brawl, unmercifully beating "the devil" out of an adversary. The same thoughts may fill another man with intense terror and grave feelings of guilt. This same man, however, who would not purposely entertain fantasies of such nature under normal conditions, may in time of war imagine himself killing the enemy with the greatest feelings of holy joy and righteousness.
quotes.translation: 有些人能轻松而兴致勃勃地想象自己参与拳斗、混战，毫不留情地将对手的"恶魔"痛打出来。同样的念头可能让另一个人充满极度恐惧与深重罪恶感。然而，这个在正常情况下不会刻意纵容此类幻想的人，在战争时期却可能想象自己怀着最神圣的喜悦与正义感杀死敌人。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many individuals are completely blind to their own beliefs about themselves, and the nature of reality. Your own conscious thoughts will give you excellent clues. Often you will find yourself refusing to accept certain thoughts that come to your mind because they conflict with other usually accepted ideas.
quotes.translation: 许多人对自己关于自身及实相本质的信念完全视而不见。你自觉的念头会提供绝佳线索。你常会发现自己拒绝接受某些浮现脑海的念头，因为它们与其他通常被接受的观念相冲突。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The first volume, like this one, defies easy description, then, since it leaps over many definitions we usually take for granted; and with its lack of chapter divisions it even confounds our ideas of what a book is. Yet it certainly contains a most intriguing, multidimensional view of the nature of probabilities, a view in which our ideas of a "simple, single event" must vanish; at least we can never again look at any event as being concrete, finished, or absolute. Seth stresses the importance of probabilities as they exist in relationship to a thought, an ordinary physical event, or the mass event of Homo sapiens as a species, and emphasizes the existence of probable realities as the understructure of free will.
quotes.translation: 第一卷与本书一样难以简单描述，因为它跨越了许多我们习以为常的定义；且因缺少章节划分，甚至颠覆了我们对"书"的概念。但它确实包含了对可能性本质最引人入胜的多维视角——在此视角中，我们对"简单、单一事件"的观念必须消融；至少我们再也无法将任何事件视为具体、完成或绝对的。赛斯强调可能性与念头、普通物质事件或智人作为物种的群体事件之间的关系，并强调可能性实相作为自由意志底层结构的存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Session 744:    This Book and Probable Ones. Seth's Reality
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 6: Reincarnation and Counterparts: The "Past" Seen Through the Mosaics of Consciousness

quotes.text: It is all in one respect hallucinatory, and yet it is your reality and you must deal with it. If you do not like the looks of the adult world, then you had better change your own expectations now. The world in which your parents live is a world which they created. It existed first in thought. It existed first in mental realms. It existed first as the stuff of dreams, and from this they spawned their universe, and from this they made their world.
quotes.translation: 从某方面看这一切都是幻觉，然而它却是你的实相，你必须与之应对。若你不喜欢成人世界的模样，那么现在最好改变你自己的期待。你父母所生活的世界是他们创造的世界。它首先存在于思想中。它首先存在于心灵领域。它首先作为梦的素材存在，由此他们孕育出他们的宇宙，由此他们创造出他们的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Thought and emotion then, is not only generally related to the physical mechanism, but as electrical actions, thoughts and emotions act directly upon the system. Again here you see, however, that it is the individual himself who initiates his own emotional climate, and then suffers or enjoys the results.
quotes.translation: 因此，念头与情绪不仅普遍与物质机制相关，作为电性活动，念头与情绪还直接作用于系统。然而在此你再次看到，正是个体自身启动了自己的情绪氛围，然后承受或享受其结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These probable realities exist within what may be generally termed your own sphere of activity, your own plane. There are many other realities that are far divorced from your own however. Every thought, as I have told you, is an action and must seek to fulfill itself. It is a fragment, therefore. You are literally surrounded by other realities that you do not perceive consciously. Some of these are perceived by the inner self, but all are not.
quotes.translation: 这些可能性实相存在于你们通常所称的活动领域、你们自己的层面之内。然而还有许多其他实相与你们自己的实相截然不同。正如我曾告诉你们的，每一个思想都是一个行动，并且必须寻求实现自身。因此它是一个片段。你们实际上被其他你们并未有意识地感知到的实相所包围。其中一些被内在自体所感知，但并非全部。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now you must understand that this continues throughout the entire system--animal and plant life. Change is gradual. In many ways it is a sleeping system, change taking place so slowly and nonviolently that the danger is in a constant status quo. The mental associative patterns are completely different from your own. Even abruptness of thought, you see, carries implications of violence, of abrupt change--the breaking of one pattern for another.
quotes.translation: 现在你们必须了解，这贯穿整个系统——动物和植物生命。变化是渐进的。在许多方面，这是一个沉睡的系统，变化发生得如此缓慢且非暴力，以至于危险在于恒常的停滞状态。心智的联想模式与你们自己的完全不同。你看，甚至思想的突然性也带有暴力的含义，即突然的改变——一种模式打破另一种模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are here also thrusts in all directions, with certain identifying pulsations that underlie all, and that have their origins within the inner self. As the vitality of the universe forms, of itself, the boundaries of the various fields of activity, and as vitality itself takes on the coloration of the various fields and forms the camouflage patterns within them, so also vitality, in the form of emotions that the camouflage patterns of the personality, even while this vitality forms both emotions and personality for every individual, every consciousness, may be thought of as a separate field of activity; and all the data relating to fields of activity may be seen to apply to any consciousness as well.
quotes.translation: 这里也有向各个方向的推进，带有某些作为一切基础的识别性脉动，这些脉动起源于内在自体。正如宇宙的生命力自身形成了各种活动领域的边界，正如生命力本身呈现出各种领域的色彩并在其中形成伪装模式，同样地，生命力以情感的形式——这些情感构成人格的伪装模式——即使当这种生命力为每个个体、每个意识同时形成情感和人格时，也可以被视为一个独立的活动领域；而所有与活动领域相关的资料也可以被视为适用于任何意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It knows full well its own indestructibility, and that of its fellows. What happens in the case of constructive psychic energy when it is purposely denied aggressive outlets? It finds out. What does it feel like to be the brunt of aggression? It forms another life situation and discovers the answer. How strong and potent is the energy that is at its command? How can it best be used? It is quite necessary that all of these questions be answered, for the inner self is composed of energy, and in other fields of activity thoughts and emotions are instantaneously translated, their results instantly seen. There is no saving time lag, as within your own system, and there is no physical body such as you know it.
quotes.translation: 它完全知道自己以及同伴的不可毁灭性。当建设性的灵性能量被故意拒绝攻击性出口时会发生什么？它会去发现。承受攻击的冲击是什么感觉？它会形成另一种生命情境并找到答案。它所支配的能量有多强大和有力？如何最好地使用它？所有这些问题的答案都是非常必要的，因为内在自体由能量组成，而在其他活动领域中，思想和情感会瞬间被转化，其结果瞬间可见。没有像你们系统内那样的时间延迟，也没有你们所知的物质身体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He saw it physically, yet could find no physical cause for it. It lasted several seconds and disappeared. As soon as Ruburt saw it he leaped back. The last line in the poem he had completed just before dinner spoke of a light that would illuminate both worlds, one of the soul and one of the flesh. Consciously he thought the light must have been caused by lightning, even while he knew with another portion of himself that that was not the case.
quotes.translation: 他物理地看到了它，却找不到任何物理原因。它持续了几秒钟然后消失了。当鲁柏看到它时，他立刻向后跳开。他在晚餐前刚完成的诗的最后一行提到了一种光，它将照亮两个世界——灵魂的世界和肉体的世界。他有意识地认为那光一定是闪电造成的，即使他内心的另一部分知道事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You do not need to banish the thought of money for you have not been concerned with money, but with the lack of money. You have thought of your dwindling bank account, and I tell you that this is why your bank account is dwindling. The material is not distorted. If you must think of your bank account--
quotes.translation: 你不需要驱除对金钱的念头，因为你一直关心的不是金钱，而是金钱的匮乏。你一直在想你那日渐减少的银行存款，而我告诉你，这正是你的银行存款日渐减少的原因。物质并没有被扭曲。如果你必须想到你的银行存款——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Since these are far more lively than ordinary shadows, and are definitely more colorful, they may be more difficult to distinguish at first. You must remember that you are wandering through a mental or psychic landscape. You can stand before the shadow of a friend in the afternoon, in waking reality, and snap your fingers all you want to, but your friend's shadow will not move one whit. It will certainly not disappear because you tell it to. In the dream world, however, any hallucination will vanish immediately as soon as you recognize it as such, and tell it to go away. It was cast originally by your own thought or feeling, and when you withdraw that source, then its "shadow" is automatically gone.
quotes.translation: 由于这些比普通影子活跃得多，色彩也绝对更丰富，起初可能更难分辨。你必须记住，你正漫步于一个心灵或精神的景观中。在清醒的现实里，你可以在午后站在朋友的影子前，随意打响手指，但朋友的影子绝不会移动分毫。它当然不会因为你命令它消失就消失。然而在梦境世界中，任何幻象一旦被你认出其本质并命令它离开，便会立即消失。它最初是由你自己的思想或感受投射而成，当你撤回那个源头时，它的"影子"便自动消散了。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: They will grow in consciousness and continue their own lines of development on different levels. In one way, we are all thought-forms, and this will be further explained in the material dealing with the god concept. Understand, however, that I do not mean that we lack our own initiative for action, individuality or purpose -- and remember also here that you live from the inside out. Then perhaps the statement will have more meaning for you.
quotes.translation: 它们会在意识中成长，并在不同层面上继续自身的发展路线。从某种角度来看，我们都是思想形态，这一点将在讨论神的概念的资料中进一步阐释。但请理解，我并非意指我们缺乏自身的行动主动性、个体性或目的——同时请记住，你是从内向外生活的。这样，这句话或许对你会有更深的意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is a constant translation of inner reality into objects in the waking state, and a constant translation of ideas into pseudoobjects in the dreaming state. Within a certain portion of dream reality, ideas or thoughts can be translated into pseudoobjects, and transported. This can only happen within certain ranges of intensities. This is what happens when you adopt a pseudoform in projections, though I am simplifying this considerably.
quotes.translation: 在清醒状态下，内在实相不断被转化为物体；而在梦境状态中，思想则不断被转化为伪物体。在梦境实相的特定范围内，思想或念头可以被转化为伪物体并加以传送。这只能在特定强度范围内发生。当你在投射中采用伪形时，情况正是如此，尽管我对此做了相当程度的简化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation. (With many pauses:) When I speak of the dream world, I am not referring to some imaginary realm, but to the kind of world of ideas, of thoughts, of mental actions, out of which all form as you think of it emerges. In actuality this is an inner universe rather than an inner world. Your physical reality is but one materialization of that inner organization. All possible civilizations exist first in that realm of inner mind.
quotes.translation: 现在：口授。（多次停顿：）当我谈及梦境世界时，我并非指某个虚幻的领域，而是指那种思想、念头、心灵行动的世界——你所认知的一切形态皆由此涌现。实际上，这是一个内在宇宙，而非内在世界。你的物质实相只是那个内在组织的一种物质化呈现。所有可能的文明首先存在于那个内在心灵的领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （A curved line may be a complicated thought, a crooked or incomplete one--and a straight line may be a more simple, direct action or thought. It follows that there are more curved lines than straight ones, both in our art on this plane, in our lives on this plane, and in our habitat on this plane.
quotes.translation: （一条曲线可能代表一个复杂的思想，一个扭曲或不完整的思想——而一条直线则可能代表一个更简单、直接的行动或思想。由此推论，无论是在我们这个层面的艺术中，还是在我们这个层面的生活与栖息地中，曲线的数量都多于直线。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The experience, the subjective universe, the "mind" of All That Is, was so brilliant, so distinct, that All That Is almost became lost, mentally wandering within this ever-flourishing, ever-growing interior landscape. Each thought, feeling, dream, or mood was itself indelibly marked with all of the attributes of this infinite subjectivity. Each glowed and quivered with its own creativity, its own desire to create as it had been created.
quotes.translation: 那体验、那主观宇宙、那"一切万有"的"心灵"是如此璀璨、如此独特，以至于一切万有几乎迷失其中，心灵漫游于这片永远繁盛、永远生长的内在景观。每一个思想、感受、梦境或情绪，都不可磨灭地烙印着这无限主观性的所有特质。每一个都以其自身的创造力、以其渴望像被创造那样去创造的欲望而闪耀颤动。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It turns beams of attention off and on. It has many facets and many volumes and many dimensions. It acts out roles, but the whole self is entire, and every individual innately knows and is intimately familiar with the intents and purposes of the whole self. And in dreams and in intuitions and unspoken thoughts, the individual comes to terms with the whole self, of which it is merely one portion, and not necessarily the dominant portion.
quotes.translation: 它开启和关闭注意力光束。它拥有许多面向、许多层次和许多维度。它扮演各种角色，但整体自体是完整的，每个个体天生就知道并熟悉整体自体的意图和目的。在梦境、直觉和未说出口的思想中，个体与整体自体达成和解——个体只是整体自体的一部分，且未必是主导部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: ([Tom:] "He talked some more about physical matter... an elaboration on the things we've talked about during the evening. The reality on another plane or in another dimension is just as physical as what we experience as physical here... just as real, seems physical to them. But the freedoms are greater, so that when we think of something on another plane, it happens instantaneously. Whereas here, there is a time lag between the time we think of something and it results in a created action or object. In the time lag on this plane, there are other thoughts, projections on the same idea or object; Seth declined to go into their effects on the final idea or object until a later time.
quotes.translation: （汤姆："他又讲了一些关于物质的事...是对我们今晚讨论内容的延伸。另一个层面或维度的现实，与我们在此体验为物质的现实同样真实...对他们而言同样真实，同样显得物质化。但那里的自由度更大，所以当我们在另一个层面想到某事时，它会即刻发生。而在此处，从我们想到某事到它产生为具体行动或物体之间，存在时间差。在这个层面的时间差里，会有其他思想、对同一想法或物体的投射；赛斯拒绝在稍后时间之前讨论它们对最终想法或物体的影响。"）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The play is the thing, and so it was. The play in which your friend performed represented the springboard for the inner portrayal, unfortunately, of sacrifice. The caution that was given did come through, but of course you apparently thought that this applied to Miss Callahan. It implied instead caution against the possibility of conflict with your friend's mother, and this could easily have occurred, to no good result in the long run.
quotes.translation: 戏是关键所在，事实正是如此。你朋友参与的那场戏，不幸地成为了内在牺牲意象的跳板。警告确实传达了出来，但你显然以为这适用于卡拉汉小姐。实际上它暗示的是要提防与你朋友母亲发生冲突的可能性——这种冲突本可轻易发生，长远来看绝无益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: A thought can be intense, then partially fade and grow intense again. (Pause.) Its own nature regulates its intensity, rather than any rules inherent in the nature of intensity itself. Some of these concepts are difficult to explain to you. In your terms it would be as if you experienced a future event, then a distant past event, then a moment from the present. You would not understand what was going on, nor see the inner logic within.
quotes.translation: 一个思想可以变得强烈，然后部分消退，再重新强烈起来。（停顿。）其自身的性质调节着它的强度，而非强度本身固有的任何规则。这些概念有些难以向你们解释。用你们的说法，这就像你同时经历未来事件、遥远过去事件和当下时刻——你无法理解发生了什么，也看不见其中的内在逻辑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You both know again what love and hate are, but as I told you before try to think in new ways. Love and hate for example are action. They are both action and they both imply action in physical bodies, and even as far as thoughts are concerned. In your plane action is the main word of importance.
quotes.translation: 你们再次明白了爱与恨是什么，但正如我之前所说，试着用新方式思考。例如爱与恨就是行动。它们都是行动，都意味着物质身体中的行动，甚至就思想而言也是如此。在你们的层面，行动是最重要的关键词。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Even physically you have not categorized all of the life-forms, and there are many co-inhabiting your system that you will never physically perceive. You do not understand the multiple reality of your own thoughts or thought forms, and you are not able to follow them out of your own mental home.
quotes.translation: 即使在物质层面，你们也未能对所有生命形态进行分类，有许多与你们共存于同一系统的生命形态，你们永远无法用物质感官感知。你们不了解自己思想或思想形态的多重实相，也无法跟随它们离开自己精神的家园。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now there are some who resist the new existence, even though they chose it, as long as possible. To some extent they must be present at birth, but they can still escape any full identification with the born infant. They hover within and about the form, but half reluctantly. There are many reasons for such behavior. Some personalities simply prefer in-between-life existence and are much more concerned with the theoretical solving of problems than the practical application necessarily involved. Others have discovered that physical existence does not meet their needs as well as they thought it would, and they will progress much better in other fields of reality and existence.
quotes.translation: 有些灵魂即使选择了新的存在，仍会尽可能抗拒它。他们必须在某种程度上参与出生过程，却仍能避免与新生婴儿完全认同。他们徘徊在形体之内与周围，带着半心半意的态度。这种行为有许多原因。有些人格单纯偏好中间生命状态，更关注理论上的问题解决而非必然涉及的实践应用。另一些则发现物质存在未能如预期满足需求，他们在其他实相与存在领域会有更好的进展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, this is not to be a technical book, so this is not the time nor place to discuss thoroughly the action, behavior or effects of these coordinate points; nor of the electromagnetic energy units -- those natural emanations of consciousness of which I spoke. I want it known, however, that thoughts and emotions are formed into physical matter by very definite methods and through laws quite valid, though they may be presently unknown.
quotes.translation: 这并非技术性书籍，因此现在不是深入讨论这些坐标点的运作、行为或效应的适当时机；也不是探讨电磁能量单元——我提过的那些意识自然放射物——的适当时机。但我希望你们明白，思想与情感是通过明确的方法、遵循虽尚未被认知却真实有效的法则，才被塑造成物质形态的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, the term God is used simply because it is an accepted term for the reality we are discussing. That which knows itself, which experiences itself within many forms and yet knows itself as something apart from the total of its sums, that left-over, unexplainable remnant you see, can be thought of as original action, original consciousness, prime mover, or consciousness as distinct from its own creations, of which it is also part.
quotes.translation: 再次说明，"上帝"一词的使用，仅因它是我们讨论的实相所被接受的术语。那个知晓自身、在众多形态中体验自身却仍认知自身为总和之外的存在，那个无法解释的剩余部分，你可以视之为原初行动、原初意识、原动力，或与其自身创造物（它也是其中一部分）有所区别的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner possibilities are far more important however, and your inner development more important than any decisions having to do with your occupation. For your inner thoughts are the only realities, and from these you form your physical circumstances, including those in the occupational area.
quotes.translation: 然而内在可能性远为重要，你的内在发展比任何与职业相关的决定更为关键。因为你的内在思想才是唯一的实相，由此你塑造出包括职业领域在内的物质环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: (7:20.) It is impossible in our time scheme to intellectually know our own potentials without trying them out, without testing them against the world's edges. We must activate our impulses and desires, try out our abilities, seek out our strengths by joyfully advancing into the given world of physical energy, physical time and space. In the development of each individual we act and reenact the startling events that brought our own universe into existence. The universe was not created in some dim past, but is newly recreated by our own thoughts, dreams, and desires--so that reality happens at all possible levels at once. And in that living endeavor we each play our part.
quotes.translation: （7点20分）在我们的时间架构中，若不尝试、不将潜能推向世界的边界，便无法在理智上认知自身潜力。我们必须激活冲动与渴望，尝试运用能力，通过欢欣地进入既定的物质能量、物质时间与空间领域，来探寻自身力量。在每个人的发展过程中，我们都在重演那曾使宇宙诞生的惊人事件。宇宙并非在某个遥远过去被创造，而是被我们自己的思想、梦想与渴望不断重新创造——因此实相同时在所有可能层面发生。在这场鲜活的努力中，我们每个人都扮演着角色。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Inspiration is often a more or less instantaneous translation, occurring for various reasons which I will give you later, without the benefit of the brain's intervention. It is this strangeness that is often noted. The individual seems not to know where the thought comes from, because he does not recognize the characteristic mark of his brain upon it. And indeed such a mark is lacking, for inspiration originates with the inner self.
quotes.translation: 灵感往往是近乎瞬间的翻译，因各种原因（我稍后会说明）发生，无需大脑的介入。正是这种陌生感常被注意到。个体似乎不知思想从何而来，因为他认不出其上大脑的独特印记。确实，这样的印记是缺失的，因为灵感源自内在自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (She described some subjective experiences she thought the personality was going to have her experience. A feeling of microscopic smallness approaching, the reverse of the giant feeling, etc. I told her she'd have to write out the data. She said the ideas were quickly leaving; the feelings were without words and she wasn't used to that yet. She thinks she panics and so shuts the voice off. The pyramid effect was dwindling by 11:15.
quotes.translation: （她描述了一些主观体验，认为人格即将让她经历这些体验。一种微观渺小感正在逼近，与巨人感相反等等。我告诉她必须把资料写下来。她说这些想法正在迅速消失；这些感受没有语言，她还不习惯这样。她认为自己惊慌失措，于是切断了声音。到11点15分时，金字塔效应正在减弱。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Also, all individuals have had familiarity with emotions, as they exist within electrical intensities, and are accustomed to reacting to them. The whole process is instantaneous. However, the thought which is now an approximation of the original thought, and actually an identity of its own--
quotes.translation: 此外，所有个体都熟悉情感，因为它们存在于电性强度中，并且习惯于对它们做出反应。整个过程是瞬间发生的。然而，那个思想——现在只是原始思想的近似物，实际上拥有自己的身份——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the first place, language as you know it is a slow affair: letter by letter strung out to make a word, and words to make a sentence, the result of a linear thought pattern. Language, as you know it, is partially and grammatically the end product of your physical time sequences. You can only focus upon so many things at one time, and your language structure is not given to the communication of intricate, simultaneous experience.
quotes.translation: 首先，你所知的语言是一种缓慢的过程：字母一个接一个地串成单词，单词组成句子，这是线性思维模式的结果。你所知的语言，部分地且语法上，是你物理时间序列的最终产物。你一次只能专注于有限的事物，而你的语言结构并不适合传达复杂、同时发生的体验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （"A connection with round colored objects, I thought this might be a vague reference to the fact that Marilyn found in her handbag, Saturday night at the establishment, a group of miniature plastic castings of animals that she had made for her two-year old son. They were translucent, of different colors, tiny horses that were not round as a marble is round, but with rounded simple Lines. We toyed with them throughout the evening.
quotes.translation: （“与圆形彩色物体的关联，我认为这可能模糊地指向一个事实：周六晚上在场所，玛丽莲在她的手提包里发现了一组她为两岁儿子制作的微型塑料动物铸件。它们是半透明的，颜色各异，小马不像弹珠那样圆，但有着圆润的简单线条。我们整晚都在把玩它们。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Every thought therefore has this kind of reality, which is the only reality, basically speaking. （Long pause.） Sense data itself has a reality independent of any given object. This sense data has its own intensity. If you can tune into that intensity, so to speak, you will automatically translate it into physical data, and you will perceive a physical object.
quotes.translation: 因此，每个思想都具有这种实相，基本上来说，这是唯一的实相。（长停顿。）感官资料本身具有独立于任何给定物体的实相。这种感官资料有其自身的强度。如果你能调谐到那个强度，可以说，你会自动将其转化为物理资料，并感知到一个物理物体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You should in any case whenever possible sketch outdoors, for you are personally renewed by such an encounter, And the implications are very different. When you are outdoors sketching there is before you a large expanse. It is easier to think in terms of size and expansion. Thoughts of expansion will help your work, so that the energy and vision are not imprisoned by form but are within form, even while in the process of change.
quotes.translation: 无论如何，只要可能，你应该在户外写生，因为这样的接触会让你个人焕然一新，其含义也大不相同。当你在户外写生时，眼前是一片广阔的空间。更容易以大小和扩展的思维来思考。扩展的想法将有助于你的工作，使能量和视野不被形式所囚禁，而是存在于形式之内，即使在变化的过程中也是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Our books are in the regular trade department. This poses some problems for the legal department, which is given to the most literal translation of reality as interpreted through law. You have almost what you could call a schizophrenic relationship, existing, say, between Parker Books and Prentice's trade-book division. The textbook division represents the workings of the intellect in the usual terms of rational thought, and in those books the qualities of the imagination, of the psyche, of poetry, of creativity, are quite lacking. Such qualities are indeed considered threats, for they do not accept easy answers, and are not content with the status quo.
quotes.translation: 我们的书籍属于常规的贸易部门。这给法律部门带来了一些问题，他们习惯于对现实进行最字面的法律解释。你们几乎可以说在帕克图书公司与普伦蒂斯贸易图书部之间存在着一种精神分裂式的关系。教科书部门代表了理性思维惯常模式下的智力运作，而在那些书籍中，想象力、心灵、诗意和创造力的特质相当匮乏。这些特质确实被视为威胁，因为它们不接受简单的答案，也不满足于现状。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: Despite all appearances, conditions of an exterior nature do not cause wars, or poverty, or disease, or any of the unfortunate circumstances apparent in the world. Your beliefs form your reality. Your thoughts generate practical experience. When these change, conditions will change. To add your own energy, focus, and concentration to dire circumstances in other portions of the world does not help, but adds to, such situations.
quotes.translation: 尽管表象如此，外在性质的条件并不会导致战争、贫困、疾病或世界上任何明显的不幸境况。你们的信念形成你们的实相。你们的思想产生实际的体验。当这些改变时，条件也会改变。将你们自己的能量、专注和注意力集中在世界其他地区的可怕境况上，非但无助于改善，反而会助长这些情况。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This book had no chapters [in order] to further disrupt your accepted notions of what a book should be. There are different kinds of organizations present, however, and in any given section of the book, several levels of consciousness are appealed to at once. (Intently:) The threads of the work are interwoven so that various portions of your consciousness are sent out, so to speak, on separate journeys of thought and imagination. Yet these side trips are also related. They intertwine, not only through the psychic organization that I have given to "Unknown" Reality, but because of the great uniting nature within the consciousness of each reader.
quotes.translation: 这本书没有章节[顺序]，是为了进一步打破你们对书籍应有样貌的既定观念。然而，书中存在着不同种类的组织方式，在书的任何特定部分，都同时诉诸于几个意识层次。（专注地：）作品的线索交织在一起，因此可以说，你们意识的各个部分被派往思想和想象的不同旅程。然而这些旁支旅程也是相互关联的。它们交织在一起，不仅因为我赋予《未知的实相》的心灵组织，还因为每位读者意识内部伟大的统一本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 743
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: This inner ego knows the outer ego well. The outer ego is but a counterfeit image of the inner ego. The outer ego as a rule is not aware of what you may think of for now as the thoughts or communications of the inner ego; but the inner ego knows every step you take, every particle of air you breathe, every dream you have; and it is the source of your own personality and is the representative of the entity of which it is part.
quotes.translation: 这个内在自我非常了解外在自我。外在自我不过是内在自我的一个仿冒形象。外在自我通常并不觉察你们目前可能认为是内在自我的思想或沟通；但内在自我知道你们迈出的每一步、呼吸的每一粒空气、所做的每一个梦；它是你们自己人格的源头，也是它所隶属的存有的代表。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Physically then you perceive an approximation of an inner event. The inner event basically is not physical. (Pause.) Now, as simply as I can put this, thoughts and emotions form, of their own electromagnetic reality, vitalized physical products called atoms and molecules. This is basically what I told you in our early analogy with the mazes and the wires.
quotes.translation: 因此，在物质层面，你们感知到内在事件的一个近似版本。内在事件本质上并非物质性的。（停顿。）现在，尽可能简单地说，思想和情感以其自身的电磁实相，形成了被称为原子和分子的活化物质产物。这基本上就是我在早期关于迷宫和电线的类比中告诉你们的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But here you become involved with one of the most meaningful aspects of the nature of personal reality, as you test your thoughts against what seems to be. There may be a time before you learn how to change your thoughts effectively, but you are engaged in a basic meaningful endeavor.
quotes.translation: 但在这里，当你们将自己的思想与看似如此的事物进行检验时，你们便涉入了个人实相本质中最具意义的一个面向。在你们学会如何有效改变思想之前，可能会有一段时间，但你们正投身于一项基本而有意义的努力之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If it is your own thought-form, then, in fact, you may learn from it by asking yourself what it represents, what problem that you have so materialized. Now you may hallucinate the same sort of thing after death, use it for a symbol, and undergo a spiritual battle of sorts that would, of course, not be necessary had you more understanding. You will work out your ideas, problems or dilemmas at your own level of understanding.
quotes.translation: 如果这是你自己的思想形态，那么事实上，你可以通过自问它代表什么、你以何种方式将问题具体化来从中学习。死后你可能会产生同样的幻觉，将其用作象征，经历某种精神战斗——当然，若你拥有更多理解，这种战斗本无必要。你将在自己的理解层面上解决你的想法、问题或困境。
