quotes.text: In prehistoric times mankind evolved the ego and self-consciousness to help him deal with the camouflage patterns that he had created. This is no contradiction, and will be explained later. He did the job so well that even when he had things under control he was not satisfied. He developed at a lopsided level. He used himself as a tool to dissect himself. The inside senses led him to a reality he could not manipulate as easily as he could a camouflage world, and he feared what he thought of as a loss of mastery.
quotes.translation: 在史前时代，人类进化出自我和自觉意识，以帮助他处理自己所创造的伪装模式。这并无矛盾，稍后会加以解释。他做得如此成功，以至于即使他已掌控一切，仍不满足。他以不平衡的层面发展。他把自己当作工具来剖析自己。内在感官引领他进入一个他无法像操控伪装世界那样轻易操控的实相，而他恐惧他所谓的掌控丧失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This material is actually not nearly as difficult to understand as it may seem. Intuitively you should pick up much of it. The intuitions are not bound by the so-called laws of logic, and cause and effect. They do not take time as you know it into consideration, therefore they are not bound by continuity or limited to communication of words or even thoughts, strung out one after another.
quotes.translation: 这份资料实际上并不像看起来那么难以理解。凭直觉你们应该能领悟其中大部分内容。直觉不受所谓的逻辑法则和因果律的束缚。它们不考虑你们所知的时间，因此不受连续性的限制，也不局限于一个接一个排列的词语甚至思想的交流。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your scientific principles have been formulated either through direct interpretation of matter as perceived through the outer senses, or formulated indirectly but in accordance with such perception. They cannot therefore be thought to apply to dimensions unperceived by the outer senses. Energy then expands in terms of value fulfillment, in the way that I have explained in past sessions.
quotes.translation: 你们的科学原理要么是通过直接解读外在感官所感知的物质而形成的，要么是间接地但依据此类感知而形成的。因此，不能认为它们适用于外在感官未感知到的维度。能量随后以价值实现的方式扩展，正如我在过去课程中所解释的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: An individual or a self also cannot hide from others his own basic intent. It is his and yet, though he possesses it, he still cannot prevent others from sensing it. Along these lines there is much to be said in that many intangibles, considered most secret by the self, do not remain within the self. No skin or bones or skeletal cage can keep the thought of the self from going outward.
quotes.translation: 个体或自我也无法向他人隐藏自己的基本意图。它是他的，然而，尽管他拥有它，他仍无法阻止他人感知到它。沿着这些思路，有许多可说的，因为许多被自我视为最隐秘的无形之物，并不会停留在自我之内。没有皮肤、骨骼或骨架能阻止自我的思想向外发散。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: If a desire for health leads to an emphasis upon symptoms to be overcome, you would be better off to avoid all thoughts of health or illness, and concentrate in another direction such as work. This follows regardless of the desired end, be it wealth, fame, or so forth. Such an emphasis can lead to a focus upon the obstacles that stand in the way. This reinforces the negative condition.
quotes.translation: 若对健康的渴望导致你过度关注需要克服的症状，那么最好完全避开健康或疾病的念头，将注意力转向其他方向，比如工作。无论追求的目标是财富、名声或其他，此理皆同。这种过度关注反而会聚焦于障碍本身，从而强化负面状况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are some things that I do not believe you clearly understand. To me, a thought is an action. It is as valid a reality. There is no basic difference between telepathy and clairvoyance, as you term them. The Emotional feelings connected with an item are as real to me as the item itself. It is these Emotional charges that are interpreted, and finally translated into physical terms.
quotes.translation: 有些事我认为你尚未完全明白。对我而言，思想即行动，其真实性同等有效。你们所谓的"心电感应"与"千里眼"并无本质区别。与某事物相关的情感感受，对我而言与事物本身同样真实。正是这些情感电荷被解读，最终转化为物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now: To some extent or another there are counterparts12 of all realities within your psyche. When you slow down, or quicken your thoughts or your perceptions, you automatically begin to alter your focus, to step aside from your officially recognized existence. This is highly important, for in certain terms you are indeed transcending the time framework that you imagine to be so real.
quotes.translation: 现在：你心灵中或多或少存在着所有实相的对等版本。当你放慢或加速思想与感知时，便会自动开始转移焦点，脱离你官方认可的存在状态。这点至关重要——从某种角度而言，你确实正在超越你自以为真实的时间框架。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 712
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You may enjoy manipulating thoughts of time in your mind. You may find yourself thinking that time is basically different from your experience of it, but fundamentally you believe that you exist in the hours and the years, that the weeks come at you one at a time, that you are caught in the onrush of the seasons.
quotes.translation: 你或许享受在脑海中操控时间概念，或许认为时间本质上与你体验的不同，但根本上你仍相信自身存在于时与年之中，相信周次依次降临，相信你被困在季节的奔流里。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is time that you regarded such difficulties instead as challenges that are a part of a creative adventure that you have yourselves chosen. You chose the adventure because it was the kind best suited to your own individual value fulfillment. In reconciling the many concepts and contradictions for yourselves, you also lead the way for many others. It would, again, help considerably if you thought of your work more as an adventure, an exciting creative adventure, than of work in your old terms.
quotes.translation: 现在该将这类困难视为挑战了——它们是你自己选择的创造性冒险的一部分。你选择这场冒险，正因它最适合你个人的价值完成。在为自己调和诸多概念与矛盾的过程中，你也在为他人开辟道路。若能将工作视为冒险而非旧有定义中的苦役，将大有裨益。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: I speak to you from the known and unknown desire that gives you your own birth, and that speaks to you from the tiniest, least-acknowledged thought that flies like a pigeon within your skull ... And in this moment of your reality, and in the desire of your being, do you even create All That Is. Bow down before no man, no woman, and no belief -- but know you are indeed the creators.
quotes.translation: 我以那赋予你诞生的已知与未知渴望对你说话，它从你颅骨内如鸽子般飞掠的最微小、最不被承认的思想中对你说话...在你实相的此刻，在你存在的渴望中，你甚至创造了"一切万有"。莫向任何人、任何信念屈膝——当知你确是创造者。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 711)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: (7th Question continued: "The object I believe came through the mail, whether or not it is a photograph." Very good, if not one hundred percent correct. The object is of course a letter; it is destined to go through the mail tomorrow. A related thought concerns the letter I had from Dr. Lodico, and mentioned earlier--this of course has already gone through the mail, on August 31.
quotes.translation: （第七问续：“我认为那件物品是通过邮件寄来的，不管是不是照片。”说得很好，即便不是百分之百正确。那件物品当然是一封信；它注定要在明天寄出。一个相关的想法涉及我之前提到过的洛迪科博士的来信——这封信当然已经在8月31日寄出了。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You will to some extent change the thought of your error, and in so doing of future errors, in your terms. You will put rungs down for others to follow. If you wonder, you will be financially comfortable, but the energy now being gathered together, and focused will be felt in all your endeavors. It is more powerful than you realize, and it will bring great changes in your lives.
quotes.translation: 你将在某种程度上改变你对错误的看法，从而改变你对未来错误的看法，用你的话说。你将放下阶梯供他人跟随。如果你感到疑惑，你的财务状况会舒适，但此刻正在聚集并聚焦的能量将在你所有的努力中被感受到。它比你意识到的更强大，它将为你的生活带来巨大改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This concept is one of the easiest to explore, since as I have said your clock time is one of the most artificial of your camouflages. The time concept in dreams may seem far different than your conception of time in the waking state, when you have your eyes on a clock and are concerned with getting to some destination by, say, 12:15. But it is not so different from time in the waking state when you are sitting alone in a room with your thoughts, and with no particular need to get anywhere.
quotes.translation: 这个概念是最容易探索的概念之一，因为正如我所说，你的钟表时间是你最人为的伪装之一。梦中的时间概念可能看起来与你清醒状态下的时间概念大不相同，当你盯着时钟，关心着要在比如12:15到达某个目的地时。但当你独自坐在房间里，沉浸在自己的思绪中，没有特别需要去任何地方时，它与清醒状态下的时间并没有那么不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: (Her pace had been faster this evening with the new voice, especially toward the break. We thought her between worlds experience a very good sign, in that the new personality was already beginning to fulfill functions, to add new dimensions to the sessions. Before, we had wondered at the reasons for its appearance for it had seemed that Seth could have given the data as easily.
quotes.translation: （今晚她用新的声音说话时节奏更快，尤其是在休息前。我们认为她介于世界之间的体验是一个非常好的迹象，表明新人格已经开始履行功能，为课程增添新的维度。之前，我们曾对其出现的原因感到好奇，因为似乎赛斯本可以同样轻松地提供这些资料。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is another reason. I do not want these sessions to get the reputation of giving demonstrations, for reasons that are rather complicated. The way in which I have given you the material results in a steady progression, and this is important. At later times my attitude may change. However, because of the attitude in the scientific world at large, these sessions should have a more sober climate, in that I do not want either of you to be thought of, in Ruburt's words, as a pair of nuts.
quotes.translation: 还有另一个原因。出于相当复杂的原因，我不希望这些课程获得进行演示的名声。我向你们提供资料的方式导致了稳定的进展，这很重要。以后我的态度可能会改变。然而，由于整个科学界的态度，这些课程应该有一个更严肃的氛围，因为我不希望你们中的任何一个，用鲁柏的话说，被认为是一对疯子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You affect the structure of your body through your thoughts. If you believe in heredity, heredity itself becomes a strong suggestive factor in your life, and can help bring about the precise malady in the body that you believed was there all along, until finally your scientific instruments uncover the "faulty mechanism," or whatever, and there is the evidence for all to see.
quotes.translation: 你通过你的思想影响你身体的结构。如果你相信遗传，遗传本身就会成为你生活中一个强烈的暗示因素，并且可以帮助在身体中引发你一直相信存在的确切疾病，直到最终你的科学仪器发现“故障机制”或其他什么，然后就有证据让所有人看到。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和影像反过来被表达并影响他人，且不仅限于象征层面。如你所知，心智活动具有电磁实相，直接影响内在自我，并直接塑造内在自我不断变化的本质。毕竟内在自我由心智活动构成，而存有本身也在持续变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I do feel that part of that enrichment involves a worldwide (and possibly universal) healing action, contributed to by each living form--that here on earth, at least, this vital force of our own creation sustains us in an unending grand synthesis of regeneration. Yet I haven't read anything about this, at least put in just this way. Our species should study the whole subject of global healing, so that it can use the knowledge gained to lead itself into new areas of thought and feeling.
quotes.translation: 我确实感到这种丰盛的一部分涉及全球性（甚至可能是宇宙性）的疗愈行动，每个生命形态都为此做出贡献——至少在地球上，我们自身创造的这股生命力，在永无止境的伟大再生综合体中维系着我们。但我从未读到过相关论述，至少没有以这种方式呈现。人类物种应当研究全球疗愈的完整课题，以便运用所得知识引领自身进入思想与情感的新领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: "Seth used Session 909 as a bridge between chapters 6 and 7 in Dreams. This means that now the session serves as a connective--a very effective lure, say--between volumes 1 and 2. Indeed, in retrospect it almost seems as though Seth, that 'energy personality essence,' planned it that way! And Jane and I look forward with intense interest to the final version of Dreams, for as always this work will be as revealing and educational for us as it will be for anybody else. I thank each reader for his or her patience in accepting the publication of Dreams in two volumes."

quotes.text: For this reason, you are much less apt to travel in those directions. In some there are built-in impediments. Even projection from your universe into a universe of antimatter is most difficult, for example. The electromagnetic makeup even of your thoughts would be adversely affected, and yet theoretically this is possible from one of these adjacent levels of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 正因如此，你不太容易朝那些方向行进。某些方向存在固有障碍。例如，从你的宇宙投射到反物质宇宙就极为困难。即便你思想的电磁构成也会受到不利影响，然而理论上从这些相邻的意识层面出发仍有可能实现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You form the fabric of your experience through your own beliefs and expectations. These personal ideas about yourself and the nature of reality will affect your thoughts and emotions. You take your beliefs about reality as truth, and often do not question them. They seem self-explanatory. They appear in your mind as statements of fact, far too obvious for examination.
quotes.translation: 你通过自身的信念与期待编织经验之网。这些关于自我与实相本质的个人观念，会影响你的思想与情绪。你将关于实相的信念视为真理，往往不加质疑。它们看似不言自明，以事实陈述的姿态出现在你心中，显然无需检验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: No thought or idea is extinguished, and they all follow the laws which I am in the process of giving you. The growth of an idea takes up no space. I have explained that the expanding universe theory contains gross error, since the universe, the real universe, is expanding; but it is expanding in terms of value fulfillment and has nothing to do with expansion in space.
quotes.translation: 没有思想或意念会消亡，它们都遵循我正逐步传授的法则。意念的成长不占据空间。我曾解释过宇宙膨胀理论存在重大谬误，因为宇宙——真实的宇宙——确实在膨胀，但这是以价值完成的方式膨胀，与空间膨胀毫无关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment. (Pause.) In such instances you are withdrawing your perceptive abilities from the physical body. They will seem to operate as usual, but they are more vivid and far-reaching. Your thoughts instantly attain a form that you can then perceive. If you think of a dog for example, quite unconsciously you form the image of a dog, which you do then perceive.
quotes.translation: 请稍等。（停顿。）在此类情形中，你正将感知能力从肉体中抽离。它们看似照常运作，实则更为鲜明且深远。你的思想会即刻形成你可感知的形态。例如，若你想到一只狗，便会无意识地构建出狗的影像，随后确实能感知到它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I say wrong, meaning no moral judgment, but the application of one method to a pursuit that cannot be adequately expressed in such a fashion. The assembly-line time and the beliefs that go along with it have given you many benefits as a society, but it should not be forgotten that the entire framework was initially set up to cut down on impulses, creative thought, or any other activities that would lead to anything but the mindless repetition of one act after another (intently).
quotes.translation: 我说"错误"并非指道德评判，而是指将一种方法应用于无法以这种方式充分表达的追求。流水线式的时间及其伴随的信念，作为社会已带给你们诸多益处，但不应忘记，整个框架最初是为了抑制冲动、创造性思维，或任何会导致除机械重复一个接一个动作之外的活动而建立的（专注地）。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are being allowed freedom within limits. (Long pause.) The human race is a stage through which various forms of consciousness travel. The ideals keep the race pointed in beneficial directions. Thoughts and emotions form the basis. You learn by seeing these turn into physical reality. You may be killed by what you have created. If so the lesson is doubly learned.
quotes.translation: 你们被允许在限制内享有自由。（长停顿。）人类是各种意识形态穿行的一个阶段。理想使人类始终指向有益的方向。思想和情感构成基础。你们通过目睹这些转化为物质实相而学习。你们可能被自己所创造的东西杀死。若是如此，教训便加倍深刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now your closest environment, physically speaking, is your body. It is not like some manikin-shape in which you are imprisoned, that exists apart from you like a casing. Your body is not beautiful or ugly, healthy or deformed, swift or slow simply because this is the kind of body that was thrust upon you indiscriminately at birth. Instead your physical form, your corporeal personal environment, is the physical materialization of your own thoughts, emotions, and interpretations.
quotes.translation: 现在，就物质而言，你们最切近的环境就是身体。它不像某种你们被囚禁其中、与你们分离存在的玩偶外壳。你们的身体并非仅仅因为出生时被随意赋予这种类型而美丽或丑陋、健康或畸形、敏捷或迟缓。相反，你们的物质形态——你们具体的个人环境——正是你们自身思想、情感和诠释的物质化显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Therefore, if you find yourself concentrating upon the evils of physical existence in such a manner, then you are not ready for such explorations. It is, of course, possible under such conditions to meet a thought-form belonging to someone else, but if you do not believe in demons to begin with, you will always recognize the nature of the phenomena and be unharmed.
quotes.translation: 因此，如果你们发现自己以这种方式专注于物质存在的邪恶，那么你们尚未准备好进行此类探索。当然，在这种情况下有可能遇到属于他人的思想形态，但若你们一开始就不相信魔鬼，你们总能认清现象的本质而毫发无伤。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It may be thought that such perception patterns or identities may be limited, but this is hardly the case. For without them, whole portions of reality would never be perceived. There is much here that will take us a long while to explain, for the line can theoretically be drawn anywhere in the formation of identities and consciousness. And herein lies your freedom.
quotes.translation: 或许有人认为此类感知模式或身份可能受限，但事实绝非如此。因为没有它们，实相的完整部分将永远无法被感知。这里有许多内容需要花很长时间解释，因为理论上，在身份与意识的形成过程中，界限可以划在任何位置。而你们的自由正在于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your environment is the physical picture of your thoughts, emotions and beliefs made visible. Since your thoughts, emotions and beliefs move through space and time, you therefore affect physical conditions separate from you.
quotes.translation: 你们的环境是思想、情感和信念的物质化图像。由于你们的思想、情感和信念穿越时空，你们因此影响着与你们分离的物质状况。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Present and future experience of those in the room are available to me, and as real as their present experience. Therefore I must remember what they think has already happened, or not yet occurred, for to me it is one. These patterns of activity, however, are also constantly changing. I say for example that I am aware of their past and future actions and thoughts; and yet what I am aware of, actually, are ever-shifting and changing patterns, both in the future and in the past.
quotes.translation: 房间内众人当下与未来的经验对我而言都是可及的，其真实性与他们当下的经验无异。因此我必须记住，他们认为已经发生或尚未发生之事，对我而言实为一体。然而这些活动模式也在持续变化。举例而言，我虽能感知他们过去与未来的行动与思想，但实际我所感知的，实为未来与过去中不断流转变化的模式。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The one thing that pleases me immensely is the way Ruburt can translate at least a few of my humorous remarks and inflections of my natural speech. It is difficult to carry to you at this point but I have hopes of doing better. Ruburt's voice is an experiment. The immediacy of our sessions would be enhanced if more of my personality could come through. I could go on quite happily, you might say blithely, for hours but I shall not. I would if I thought I could get away with it.
quotes.translation: 最令我欣喜的一点，是鲁柏至少能传达我部分幽默话语与自然语调的抑扬变化。此刻要完整传递这些特质仍有困难，但我期待能做得更好。鲁柏的声音是个实验。若我的更多人格特质能穿透显现，我们课程的直接性将大为提升。我本可欢快——甚至可说轻快地——持续数小时，但我不会这么做。除非确信能蒙混过关，否则我自会适可而止。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. If you could see the body as it exists within the electric field, you would certainly not recognize it, for its shape would bear no resemblance to the physical shape as you know it. The electric counterpart to the physical body exists, then, as an identity formed by various electrical systems operating more or less as one. It is an electric reality in which most certainly even thoughts exist as actualities, ever-moving spheres of more or less independent electric systems.
quotes.translation: 现在。若你能看见电磁场中的身体形态，定然无法辨识——其轮廓与你所知的物质形体毫无相似之处。物质身体的电磁对应体，实为由多种电磁系统或多或少整合运作所形成的身份体。这是一个电磁实相，其中连思想都以实体的形式存在，如同不断流转的、相对独立的电磁系统球体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Several other methods of communication occur. They do not spring from nowhere. You use them beneath conscious level to some degree now. They grow into prominence. Images are widely used, but these images would be fourth dimensional to your way of thinking. They are far from flat. They have a reality, and these are, what you have read, referred to as thought forms.
quotes.translation: 另有数种沟通方式存在。它们并非凭空而生。你们在意识层面之下已部分运用这些方式。它们将逐渐凸显。意象被广泛使用，但以你们的思维方式来看，这些意象属于第四维度。它们绝非平面化的存在，而是具有实相——这正是你们所读过的"思想形态"概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, it is indeed a mirage, but it is a mirage with which you must deal. It is not so much, you see, as he thought, that nothing has meaning. Everything has so much meaning that basically no one thing can have more meaning than another, because all reality is implied within each sample of it.
quotes.translation: 这确实是幻象，但却是你们必须应对的幻象。并非如他所想那般"万物皆无意义"。恰恰相反，万物蕴含的意义如此丰沛，以至于本质上没有任何事物能比另一事物更具意义——因为所有实相都隐含于每个样本之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is a term used occasionally to the effect that an emotional block is like a wall. The analogy is an excellent one. I have told you earlier that there are other kinds of structures beside physical structures. Emotions and thoughts have their own structures, that may be manipulated in the same manner that physical objects are manipulated, generally speaking.
quotes.translation: 有个偶尔使用的术语，大意是情感障碍犹如一堵墙。这个比喻极为精妙。我先前告诉过你们，除了物质结构之外，还存在其他类型的结构。情感与思想拥有自身的结构，一般而言，这些结构可像操控物质对象那样被操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As a child he once thought that his father was immortal, in human terms -- that he could do no wrong. The son tries to vindicate the father by doing no wrong himself, and perhaps by succeeding where it seems the father might have failed. It is much more natural for the male to try to vindicate the father than it is to destroy him, or envy him in negative terms.
quotes.translation: 他小时候曾以为父亲在人类意义上是不朽的——认为父亲绝不会犯错。儿子试图通过自己不犯错来为父亲正名，或许还会在父亲可能失败之处取得成功。男性试图为父亲正名，远比试图毁灭他或以负面方式嫉妒他要自然得多。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Catch yourself in a simple thought and try to experience the beginnings of that action. You will be led into action indeed in a completely new way. Then try to experience this simple action as it affects others, not only emotionally and physically in terms of the changes it elicits from their complicated structures, but also the new actions it requires of them.
quotes.translation: 捕捉一个简单的念头，试着体验这个行动的起源。你将以全新的方式被带入行动之中。然后试着体验这个简单行动如何影响他人——不仅是从情绪和身体层面，看它从他们复杂结构中引发的改变，还包括它要求他们采取的新行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You with your conscious mind are to discriminate among those thoughts as to which ones you want to form into your system of beliefs (intently), but in so doing you are not to pretend blindness. You may at times wish that a rainy day were a sunny one, but you do not stand at the window and deny that the rain is falling, or that the air is cold and the sky dark.
quotes.translation: 你拥有意识心，要在那些念头中辨别哪些是你想纳入信念体系的（专注地），但这样做时，你不可假装视而不见。你有时可能希望雨天是晴天，但你不能站在窗前否认雨正在下，或否认空气寒冷、天空阴沉。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When massive doses of LSD are used, you are artificially creating a disaster area from which you hope to salvage an efficient working self. It is true that the old interactions between an associative pattern of thought and its habitual action may be broken down, but it is also true that the inner-ordered structure has been shocked psychically and biologically.
quotes.translation: 当使用大剂量LSD时，你是在人为制造一个灾难区域，希望从中拯救出一个有效运作的自我。诚然，联想性思维模式与其习惯性行动之间的旧有互动可能被打破，但同样真实的是，内在有序结构已在心灵和生理上受到冲击。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is some material that we have not given you, lest the implications lead you to thoughts of insignificance. But you are not simply receivers, you are also givers. As your own universe was formed by entities that you do not presently understand, so the discards of your own consciousness form realities for entities that are scarcely aware of your existence.
quotes.translation: 这部分资料我们之前未曾给予，唯恐其含义会引导你产生无足轻重的想法。但你并非只是接收者，你也是给予者。正如你自己的宇宙由你目前尚不理解的存在体所形成，你意识的废弃物也为几乎察觉不到你存在的存在体形成了实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are such subtle qualities affecting the nature of all thought, such emotional gradations, that no one is ever identical -- (smile) and incidentally, no physical object in your system is an exact duplicate of any other. The atoms and molecules that compose it -- any object -- have their own identities that color and qualify any object that they form.
quotes.translation: 有如此微妙的特质影响着所有思想的本质，如此多的情绪层次，以至于没有两个念头完全相同——（微笑）顺便一提，你们系统中的任何物质对象也没有完全相同的复制品。构成任何物体的原子和分子，都有其自身特性，会着色并限定它们所形成的任何物体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The completely uncamouflaged layer could be rather bewildering. However you might automatically attempt to project images within it. The images would not take, so to speak, but would appear and disappear with great rapidity. This would be a silent area. Thoughts as a rule would not be perceived here, for the symbols that form them would not be understood.
quotes.translation: 完全未经伪装的那一层可能会相当令人困惑。然而你可能会自动尝试在其中投射影像。这些影像可以说无法成形，而是会以极快的速度出现又消失。这将是一个寂静的区域。思想通常不会在此处被感知，因为构成思想的符号无法被理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (John said the separation of elements or dates could refer to the political office he was asked to run for. Since the income would mean a loss to John, he thought it might be supplemented by his holding a sinecure of a job at the same time; said job being furnished by a member of the political organization. John said this is often done in political life.
quotes.translation: （约翰说元素或日期的分离可能指的是他被要求竞选的政治职位。由于这份收入会让约翰蒙受损失，他认为可以通过同时担任一份挂名职务来弥补；该职务由政治组织的一名成员提供。约翰说这在政治生活中是常有的事。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Like the mountain, therefore, you have a history in terms of the present that is yours, and yet not yours. It does not control you, for you alter it with each thought and action, even as each motion at the mountain's top affects its base. The layers at the bottom, however, are also constantly changing, so that the whole area is a gestalt of relatedness.
quotes.translation: 因此，如同山岳一般，你拥有一个属于当下、既属于你又不完全属于你的历史。它并不控制你，因为你用每个思想和行动改变它，正如山顶的每个动作都会影响山脚。然而底部的岩层也在持续变化，使得整个区域成为相互关联的完形。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 727
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: No physical matter is without this electromagnetic reality, and no thought exists which does not exist within this reality. Again, I am not speaking symbolically, but quite practically. Emotions, having their own reality within this system, do not affect physical matter indirectly, but cause specific electromagnetic changes within the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 没有任何物质实体不具备这种电磁实相，也没有任何思想能脱离这个实相而存在。再次强调，我并非象征性地说，而是非常实际地。情绪在这个系统内拥有自己的实相，它们并非间接影响物质实体，而是会在物质有机体内引发特定的电磁变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Tell yourself several times a day that you can deal with whatever problems you have. Do not keep thinking of the job situation so that you are hammering yourself over the head with it constantly. Whenever you find yourself projecting failure in any sense into the future, even into tomorrow, stop yourself, remind yourself that your thoughts form reality.
quotes.translation: 每天对自己说几次：你能处理遇到的任何问题。不要一直想着工作状况，以至于不断用这个问题敲打自己的脑袋。每当你发现自己以任何方式将失败投射到未来，甚至只是明天，就立刻停止，提醒自己：你的思想形成实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Discipline then should not only be considered, as it is by some schools of thought, as a mere mental discipline over the muscles, or various portions of the body by the inner self, but indeed a discipline in terms of training of the ego by the inner self, so that the ego as a personality achieves a well-balanced relationship with the physical universe.
quotes.translation: 因此，纪律不应像某些思想学派所认为的那样，仅仅被视为内在自我对肌肉或身体各部分的心理控制，而应被视为内在自我对自我的训练，使自我作为人格与物质宇宙达成平衡的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The idea has an energy potential based upon the innate energy potential of its creator. You are dealing now with what may be thought of as energy envelopes, and this is a most valid description of all realities. Continued experience in conceiving ideas and manipulating them and transforming them actually adds to the available energy of the individual.
quotes.translation: 思想具有基于其创造者内在能量潜能的能量势能。你现在处理的是可被视为能量包膜的东西，这是对所有实相最有效的描述。持续构思、操控和转化思想的经验，实际上会为个体增加可用能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are various periods of training that vary according to the individual. You must understand the nature of reality before you manipulate within it intelligently and well. In this environment and in physical reality, you are learning... You are supposed to be learning... that your thoughts have reality and that you create the reality that you know.
quotes.translation: 训练阶段因人而异。在明智且妥善地操控实相之前，你必须先理解实相的本质。在这个环境与物质实相中，你正在学习……你本应学习……你的思想具有实相，并且你创造了你所知的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Reading this material and understanding the nature of this attack should end it. His book is helping others in Saratoga. He should be drawing gratitude and health from this thought reality. The yoga exercises will in themselves straighten out the kinks here, with his understanding, as he begins to automatically attract forces of health and vitality.
quotes.translation: 阅读这份资料并理解这次攻击的本质，应能终结它。他的书正在帮助萨拉托加的其他读者。他应从这个思想实相中汲取感恩与健康。瑜伽练习本身，配合他的理解，将理顺这些纠结，使他开始自动吸引健康与活力的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The ego is your idea of your physical image in relation to the world. Your self image is not unconscious, then. You are quite aware of it, though often you reject certain thoughts about it in favor of others. False beliefs can result in a rigid ego that insists upon using the conscious mind in one direction only, further distorting its perceptions.
quotes.translation: 自我是你对自己与世间关联的肉身形象的概念。因此你的自我形象并非无意识。你相当清楚它，尽管你常为了接纳某些想法而排斥关于它的另一些想法。虚假信念可能导致僵化的自我，坚持只朝单一方向运用意识心，进一步扭曲其感知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are in your terms, then, unlimited probable future events for which you are now setting groundworks. The nature of the thoughts and feelings you originate and those that you habitually or characteristically receive set a pattern, so you will choose from those probable futures those events that will physically become your experience. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 以你们的时间观念而言，存在无限可能的未来事件，你们现在正为其奠定基础。你发起的思想与感受的本质，以及你习惯性或特质性接收的那些，会设定一个模式，使你从那些可能的未来中选择将具体化为你经验的事件。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In his normal condition Augustus thought of his own powerlessness -- for he had denied himself normal aggressive action -- and felt this weak. The beliefs activated the body's cellular memory, weakening the body and impeding its function. Yet for a time, while performance was dulled it was steady. A balance was maintained that suited his purposes.
quotes.translation: 在正常状态下，奥古斯都认为自己无力——因为他否认了自己正常的攻击性行动——并感到自己虚弱。这些信念激活了身体的细胞记忆，削弱了身体并阻碍其功能。然而有一段时间，虽然表现迟钝，却保持稳定。维持了一种符合他目的的平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Once more -- (humorously:) that will save you from scratching out another "again," "however," or whatever -- your body is mobilized when you want to move. It responds to your intent and purpose. It is your private inner environment, psychically speaking. Your psychological intents instantly mobilize your energies on a psychic level. You have what I will call for now "a body of thought," and it is that "body" that constantly springs into action at your intent.
quotes.translation: 再次——（幽默地：）这能省得你再划掉一个“再次”、“然而”或别的什么——当你想移动时，你的身体便会被动员起来。它回应你的意图和目的。从灵性角度来说，它是你私密的内在环境。你的心理意图会立即在灵性层面动员你的能量。你拥有我暂且称之为的“思想体”，正是这个“体”不断应你的意图而启动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 833, JANUARY 31, 1979
9:21 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: They must be interpreted instead through the use of those inner senses of which I have spoken, for these are the basic tools of the inner self. I realize that it is frowned upon to speak in terms of a limited intellect, which cannot understand a whole reality because of a built-in deficiency; nevertheless while it is true that the intellect by itself cannot grasp or comprehend inner reality, this should not be thought of as a deficiency inherent in intellect.
quotes.translation: 它们必须通过我所说的那些内在感官来解读，因为这些是内在自性的基本工具。我明白，谈论有限智力因固有缺陷而无法理解整体实相，这常遭人非议；然而，尽管智力本身确实无法把握或领悟内在实相，但这不应被视为智力固有的缺陷。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: "Four: I will realize that the future is a probability. In terms of ordinary experience, nothing exists there yet. It is virgin territory, planted by my feelings and thoughts in the present. Therefore I will plant accomplishments and successes, and I will do this by remembering that nothing can exist in the future that I do not want to be there."
quotes.translation: “第四：我将认识到未来是一种可能性。就普通经验而言，那里尚不存在任何事物。它是处女地，由我当下的感受和思想所播种。因此，我将播种成就与成功，而我会通过记住这一点来做到：未来不可能存在任何我不希望它存在的事物。”
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Permanence as the ego thinks of it would be an alien concept to these portions of the self, and to them a highly distasteful concept, adding up to rigidity. Flexibility is the key here, a voluntary changing or alteration of the self as it is allowed to change freely with each probability that is explored. Experience here therefore is of a plastic nature. Some thought concerning your own dream state may give you an intimate key to understand what I mean here.
quotes.translation: 自我所认为的永恒，对这些自性部分而言将是一个陌生的概念，对它们来说甚至是一个极其令人反感的概念，等同于僵化。灵活性才是关键，即自性随着它所探索的每一种可能性而自由改变时，所进行的一种自愿的转变或调整。因此，这里的经验具有可塑性。对你自身梦境状态的一些思考，或许能为你提供一个亲密的钥匙，以理解我在此所说的意思。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: If all of your beliefs, not just your "fortunate" ones, were not materialized, you would never thoroughly understand on a physical level that your ideas create reality. If only your "positive" beliefs were materialized then you would never clearly comprehend the power of your thought, for you would not completely experience its physical results.
quotes.translation: 如果你所有的信念——而不仅仅是那些“幸运的”信念——都没有被物质化，你就永远不会在物质层面上彻底理解你的观念创造了实相。如果只有你“积极的”信念被物质化，那么你就永远不会清楚地理解你思想的力量，因为你不会完全体验其物质结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If your Friday get-togethers have become boring, it is to a large extent because you have both allowed them to do so, and not taken the lead in directing the conversations along more responsible lines. For these young people can offer much. They look at things with fresh minds, and their questions can lead both of you along new lines of thought.
quotes.translation: 如果你们周五的聚会变得无聊，很大程度上是因为你们俩都允许它们变得如此，而没有主动引导对话走向更负责任的路线。因为这些年轻人可以提供很多东西。他们以新鲜的头脑看待事物，他们的问题可以引导你们俩沿着新的思路前进。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The thoughts of children give excellent clues as to mankind's nature, but many adults do not remember any childhood thoughts except those that fit, or seem to fit, in with their beliefs about childhood.
quotes.translation: 儿童的思想为人类的本性提供了绝佳的线索，但许多成年人只记得那些符合或似乎符合他们对童年认知的童年想法。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There is nothing wrong with the idea of an investigation. Ruburt simply should not be involved in it. It is not his place. It is not his area, and because of his conscientiousness, and hardheadedness. He would be much harder on these women than is necessary. But the thought of him baiting an elderly 72 year-old self-deluded woman is too much.
quotes.translation: 调查的想法本身并无不妥。鲁柏根本不应涉足其中。这不是他的职责所在，也不是他的领域，因为他过于认真且固执己见。他对待这些女性的方式会比必要情况严苛得多。但想到他要与一位72岁自欺欺人的老妇人周旋，实在令人难以接受。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （We thought this connection with "a trip by train" might be the distant connection referred to by Seth, when we remembered that while Marie Coluccis mother had been visiting in Elmira, the mother's husband died of a heart attack at home in New Jersey, while bowling. This would be the connection with "service" and "Flowers, " meaning funeral.
quotes.translation: （我们曾以为"火车之旅"的联系就是赛斯所指的遥远关联，后来想起玛丽·科鲁奇的母亲在埃尔迈拉做客期间，其丈夫在新泽西家中打保龄球时因心脏病去世。这便与"服务"和"鲜花"产生了关联，意指葬礼。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Fear, faced and felt with its bodily sensations and the thoughts that go along with it, will automatically bring about its own state of resolution. The conscious system of beliefs behind the impediment will be illuminated, and you will realize that you feel a certain way because you believe an idea that causes and justifies such a reaction.
quotes.translation: 恐惧，若连同其身体感受及伴随的念头一同面对并感受，将自动引发其自身的化解状态。阻碍背后的意识信念系统将被照亮，你会意识到自己之所以有某种感受，是因为你相信某个观念，这个观念引发了这种反应并为其提供了正当理由。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Do not concentrate on symptoms, but on feelings of health... Do not get caught up in sympathy... abilities won't be as effective. Before sleep direct your thoughts to those who need help... The healing abilities will automatically teach control in other areas... To help others also helps maintain your own control, and will inspire others...
quotes.translation: 不要专注于症状，而要专注于健康的感觉……不要陷入同情之中……能力将无法有效发挥。入睡前将思绪转向需要帮助的人……疗愈能力会自动教导其他领域的掌控……帮助他人也有助于维持自身的掌控，并将激励他人……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You must study the quality of life, dare to follow the patterns of your own thoughts and emotions, and to ride that mobility, for in that mobility there are hints of the origin of the universe and of the psyche. The poet's view of the universe and of nature is more scientific, then, than the scientists', for more of nature is comprehended.
quotes.translation: 你必须研究生命的本质，敢于追随自己思想和情感的轨迹，驾驭那种流动性，因为在那流动性中蕴含着宇宙和心灵的起源线索。因此，诗人对宇宙和自然的看法比科学家更科学，因为更多自然被领悟了。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If you are religious-minded and fundamental in your beliefs, you may blame a devil who causes you to behave in such and such a manner. As the body creates antibodies* to regulate itself, so you will set up mental and emotional "antibodies," certain thoughts that are "good," to protect you from the fantasies or ideas that you consider bad.
quotes.translation: 如果你有宗教倾向且信仰原教旨主义，你可能会归咎于某个魔鬼，认为是它让你以如此这般的方式行事。正如身体会产生抗体来自我调节，你也会建立精神与情感的"抗体"——某些你认为"好"的思想——来保护你免受那些你视为不良的幻想或观念的侵扰。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is a constant give and take between psychic and chemical components which actually cause your daily weather, your weather cycles, seasons, droughts and storms. This physical weather then in its turn affects and changes the psychic atmosphere of each individual. The force that causes your weather can be thought of as self-generating.
quotes.translation: 心灵与化学成分之间存在着持续的交互作用，这种交互实际上造就了你日常的天气、天气周期、季节、干旱与风暴。而这一物理天气反过来又会影响并改变每个个体的心灵氛围。那股引发天气的力量可以被视为是自我生成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Apropos of the material I've been covering in these pages, I want to close this essay with quotations from two sessions that I've always thought are among the best Seth has given. These sessions still live, and in them he reinforces the idea that each of us does create our own reality. Both can be found in Chapter 1 of Personal Reality.
quotes.translation: 关于我在这些篇章中一直探讨的材料，我想引用两节课程的内容来结束本文——这两节课一直被我视为赛斯所给予的最佳资料之一。这些课程至今仍充满生命力，在其中他强化了这样一个理念：我们每个人确实都在创造自己的实相。这两节课均可在《个人实相》第一章中找到。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: This "life-symbolization" may be adopted by those who gave little thought to self-examination during their lifetime. It is a part of the self-examination process, therefore, in which an individual forms his life into an image and then deals with it. Such a method is not used by all. Sometimes a series of such episodes are necessary....
quotes.translation: 这种"生命象征化"可能被那些在世时很少进行自我检视的人所采用。因此，它是自我检视过程的一部分——个体将自己的生命塑造成一个意象，然后与之互动。并非所有人都使用这种方法。有时需要一系列这样的插曲……
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （"Someone runs away." I thought this a reference to the fact that Don Wilbur and his wife Marilyn left the dancing establishment somewhat earlier than the rest of us did, because he was very tired after putting many hours of overtime work for the county, in connection with the snow we have been getting this month. This was not correct.
quotes.translation: （"有人逃走了。"我以为这指的是唐·威尔伯和他的妻子玛丽莲比我们其他人稍早离开了舞厅，因为他为了处理本月持续的降雪，为县里加班了很多小时，已经非常疲惫。但这个理解并不正确。）

quotes.text: (A one-minute pause at 11:20.) While you were so concerned with protecting what you thought of as the boundaries and integrity of one selfhood, as a race you actually arrived at a point where you were beginning to deny your own greater reality. But all of this is part of the experiment upon which the race embarked in your probability.
quotes.translation: （11:20停顿一分钟。）当你们如此专注于保护你们所认为的单一自性的边界与完整性时，作为一个种族，你们实际上已经到达了一个开始否认自身更大实相的节点。但这一切都是你们种族在你们的可能性中所展开的实验的一部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In a projection the problems will be of a different sort. The form of a man for example, may be a thought form, or fragment sent quite unconsciously by another individual whom it resembles. It may be another projectionist like yourself. It may be a potential form like any potential object--a played-over-andover-again record of a form.
quotes.translation: 在投射中，问题会是另一种性质。例如，一个人的形态可能是一个思想形态，或是由另一个与他相似的人无意识发出的片段。它可能是像你一样的另一个投射者。它可能是一个潜在形态，如同任何潜在物体——一个被反复播放的形态记录。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You do retain coded memory of these. The thoughts themselves, also psychic realities, were projected outward, changing and affecting the physical environment in direct and objective terms. They acted independently of you after their projection. Nevertheless they changed your (underlined) environment. Indeed, they form the environment.
quotes.translation: 你确实保留了这些的编码记忆。思想本身，也是心灵实相，被向外投射，以直接而客观的方式改变并影响物质环境。它们在投射后独立于你运作。然而，它们改变了你的（强调）环境。事实上，它们构成了环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: For the thought shall seed the world and the world shall seed the universe. The cowering soul is, indeed, the soul who believes himself a physical being. He is therefore at the mercy of every physical camouflage. He does not realize that he is what he is. He must live in the world he has created, and it is a miserable and cruel world.
quotes.translation: 因为思想将播种世界，而世界将播种宇宙。畏缩的灵魂，确实是那个相信自己只是物质存在的灵魂。因此，他受制于每一个物质幻相。他未意识到他本来的面目。他必须活在他所创造的世界里，而那是一个悲惨而残酷的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The next chapter will deal with your physical reality as it appears to me and others like me. This chapter will contain some rather fascinating points, for not only do you form the physical reality that you know, but you are also forming other quite valid environments in other realities by your present thoughts, desires and emotions.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讨论你们的物质实相，如它对我及像我这样的存在所显现的那样。这一章将包含一些相当引人入胜的观点，因为你们不仅形成了你们所知的物质实相，还通过你们当前的思想、欲望和情感，在其他实相中形成了其他同样有效的环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: As a result in such instances, it is up to him to interpret the image correctly. The words that you hear are my words and not Ruburt's. However, they are representations of my thought, as they are sifted through various layers, first of all of our composite psychological framework, and then through layers of Ruburts own personality.
quotes.translation: 因此，在这种情况下，他必须正确解读这个影像。你听到的话语是我的话语，而非鲁柏的。然而，它们是我思想的表征，经过层层过滤，首先是我们复合的心理架构，然后通过鲁柏自身人格的层次。

source_raw.title: （Seth began talking about moment points in the I49th-152nd sessions. He began on the spacious present in session 44 in Volume 2.

quotes.text: It is an example of the way in which his abilities came to his aid, giving him inner assurances when they were most needed. He realizes that he is a creator of the book, not its prisoner, and he once thought that he was. He has stepped clear of it (Pause), its fate no longer seen as his fate, regardless of what happens to the book.
quotes.translation: 这是他能力如何助他一臂之力的一个例子，在最需要时给予他内在的确认。他意识到自己是这本书的创造者，而非其囚徒，而他曾一度以为自己是的。他已从中抽身而出（停顿），无论这本书遭遇什么，它的命运不再被视为他的命运。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: All of the powers of your inner self are set into activation as a result of your conscious beliefs. You have lost a sense of responsibility for your conscious thought because you have been taught that it is not what forms your life. You have been told that regardless of your beliefs you are terrorized by unconscious conditioning.
quotes.translation: 你内在自我的所有力量都因你有意识的信念而被激活。你已失去对自身有意识思想的责任感，因为你被教导说，它并非塑造你人生的因素。你被告知，无论你的信念如何，你都会受到无意识制约的恐吓。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is however most unfortunate that intelligent men will not listen to intelligent and sane and illuminating data without requiring such magicians tricks as this. I am however and always have been quite practical. And as a practical personality （loud） I am as sly as any psychologist ever thought of being. I will therefore manage.
quotes.translation: 然而，最不幸的是，明智之人竟不愿聆听明智、健全且具启发性的资料，除非要求此类魔术师的把戏。但我始终且一向相当务实。作为一个务实的（大声地）人格，我比任何心理学家所曾设想过的都要狡猾。因此我会设法应对。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now. Such thoughts are excellent mental exercise for him, and while he is not precisely correct in either of these suppositions, in a basic manner I cannot say that he is precisely wrong.
quotes.translation: 现在。这类思想对他而言是极佳的心智锻炼，而虽然他的这两个假设并不完全正确，但从根本方式来说，我不能说他完全错误。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. While the inner self is aware of this connection, the present self has been fooling itself to some degree, for it did not accept the intuitional knowledge. Regardless of what you thought consciously therefore, you still inwardly blamed yourself for letting the child go, and therefore the difficulty with the womanly organs.
quotes.translation: 现在。虽然内在自我知晓这个关联，但当前自我在某种程度上一直在欺骗自己，因为它并未接受直觉性的知识。因此，无论你有意识地怎么想，你内心仍因让孩子离去而自责，从而导致了女性器官的困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
