source_raw.title: (Continuation of Session 458, January 20, 1969, after break at 9:47. This material is not included in the records.

quotes.text: For example, Mr. Foxs dream meetings were quite valid. This is what happens in such a case. Those who agree on such a meeting within dream reality must have certain abilities developed. They must be capable of taking waking consciousness into the dream state. They must be able to manipulate within it. Each of them therefore constructs, you see, the dream location at which the have agreed to meet, a point not thought of by Ruburt's Mr. Fox.
quotes.translation: 例如，福克斯先生的梦境会面相当有效。这就是此类情况中发生的事。那些同意在梦境实相中会面的人，必须发展出某些能力。他们必须能将清醒意识带入梦境状态。他们必须能在其中操控。因此，你看，他们各自建构了约定会面的梦境地点——这是鲁柏的福克斯先生未曾想到的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: A longer duration of projection is possible. The vividness is extraordinary. You will begin here to perceive very clearly constructions that are not your own, where earlier these were but dimly glimpsed. A certain period of orientation will be necessary, simply because these other constructions may be bewildering. Some will exist in your future. Some may have existed in your past, and some were thought of but never physically materialized.
quotes.translation: 投射的持续时间可以更长。其生动性非同寻常。你将在此开始非常清晰地感知到并非你自身的建构，而先前这些建构仅能模糊瞥见。一段特定的定向期将是必要的，仅仅因为这些其他建构可能令人困惑。有些将存在于你的未来。有些可能存在于你的过去，而有些则曾被构想但从未在物质层面具体化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: None of this is predetermined. An offshoot probable self might leave your reality at age 13, say, but could intersect with you again at age 30 for a variety of reasons -- where to you, you suddenly change a profession, or become aware of a talent you thought you had forgotten, and find yourself developing it with amazing ease.
quotes.translation: 这一切都非预先注定。一个分支的可能自我可能在13岁时离开你的实相，但出于各种原因可能在30岁时再次与你交汇——对你而言，你会突然改变职业，或意识到自己以为早已遗忘的才能，并发现自己以惊人的轻松发展它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This communication, while taking place in your time, and in your present, is nevertheless partially responsible in other dimensions for what you would call future developments in your own personalities, which you can now in turn contact. This is partially what I am, far more than you are, or that Seth is as you thought of him.
quotes.translation: 这种沟通虽然发生在你们的时间与当下，但在其他维度中却部分促成了你们人格中所谓的未来发展，而你们现在又能反过来接触这些发展。这正是我的一部分本质——远超过你们，也超过你们所认知的赛斯。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These sessions represent what you might call previews of eternity, in that you are to some extent receptors of thought that is not hampered by time, and of a companionship that has not ceased with the stirring of the centuries, and with a valid emotional relationship that has escaped the camouflage aspect of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这些课代表你们所谓的永恒预览，因为你们在某种程度上是未受时间阻碍的思想接收者，是历经世纪流转仍未断绝的陪伴，以及一种超越物质实相伪装的有效情感关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These units are natural emanations from all kinds of consciousness. They are the invisible formations resulting from reaction to any kind of stimuli. They very seldom exist in isolation, but unite under certain laws. They change both their form and their pulsation. Their relative "duration" depends upon the original intensity behind them -- that is, behind the original thought, emotion, stimuli, or reaction that brought them into being.
quotes.translation: 这些单位是各类意识自然散发之物。它们是对任何刺激反应后形成的无形结构。它们极少孤立存在，而是遵循特定法则结合。它们既改变形态也改变脉动。其相对"存续时间"取决于背后的原始强度——即产生它们的最初思想、情感、刺激或反应的强度。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: For one thing the self is usually thought of in terms of existence only within one particular time sequence pattern. Its experience however is rooted in the past, as you think of the past. Since there is actually only a spacious present this means that the self is rooted both in the past and in the future, using your terms.
quotes.translation: 首先，自我通常被认为只存在于某个特定时间序列模式中。然而其经验却根植于你们所谓的过去。由于实际上只有广袤的当下，这意味着用你们的术语来说，自我既根植于过去也根植于未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Quite literally, the "inner self" forms the body by magically transforming thoughts and emotions into physical counterparts. You grow the body. Its condition perfectly mirrors your subjective state at any given time. Using atoms and molecules, you build your body, forming basic elements into a form that you call your own.
quotes.translation: 确切地说，"内在自我"通过将思想与情感神奇转化为物质对应物来塑造身体。你生长着这具身体。其状态在任何时刻都完美映照你的主观状况。你运用原子与分子构建身体，将基本元素塑造成你称之为自己的形态。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This automatic procedure works both ways, then, constantly. Various portions of the self retain memory of the information, still in the form in which they have interpreted it. The thoughts and images, while being condensed, are nevertheless then retained in their particular levels of the personality in their own form.
quotes.translation: 这个自动程序于是持续地双向运作。自我的各个部分保留着对信息的记忆，仍以它们所诠释的形式存在。思想和意象在被浓缩的同时，仍以其自身形态保留在人格的特定层面中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: For the framework is the same framework in which you have your physical existence. We will make you investigators even in your sleep; and you can see now how your very investigations are bound to change the nature of your dreams themselves. Only in this case nothing will be lost, and much gained. It is unfortunate that medical men who deal with the mind as a specialty have not thought of some of these connections more thoroughly.
quotes.translation: 因为那个架构与你拥有物质存在的架构是相同的。我们让你即使在睡眠中也成为调查者；现在你可以看到，你的调查本身必然会改变你梦境的性质。只是在这种情况下，没有任何损失，反而收获良多。遗憾的是，专门研究心灵的医学人士并未更深入地思考这些关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （"A connection with a photograph", referred we thought to the fact that my brother took color pictures of the wedding. We visited him last Sunday at my parents home, in Sayre, PA, and he had expected to have the color prints with him; however they had not arrived from the processor yet, to our disappointment and his.
quotes.translation: （"与一张照片的关联"，我们曾认为这指的是我哥哥在我父母家——宾夕法尼亚州塞尔镇——拍摄了婚礼的彩色照片。上周日我们拜访他时，他本应随身带着彩色照片；但令我们和他失望的是，照片尚未从冲印店送达。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: A disagreement here somewhere, in connection with two men. This is not the disagreement that Dr. Instream spoke of to you and Ruburt when you met. （Pause at 10:15. See Session 169 in Volume 4.）

quotes.text: This is the case as far as the idea of a closed system is concerned. All so- called closed systems are caused by a limiting of perception, a narrowing down of distinction, a subconscious agreement that the props are real, and that boundaries exist. Conversely, the boundaries do exist when they are thought to exist.
quotes.translation: 就封闭系统的概念而言，情况正是如此。所有所谓的封闭系统，都是由感知的限制、分辨力的收窄、以及一种潜意识的共识所造成——即认为道具是真实的，边界是存在的。反过来说，当边界被认为存在时，它们确实存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now without your particular physical senses you would not perceive the couch as solid. Consciousness that has different perceptive mechanisms than your own is unaware of our now famous blue couch. You make the organization. Your thoughts perceive an organization. You enforce the organization, and indeed create it.
quotes.translation: 现在，没有你特定的物质感官，你就不会感知到沙发是实体的。拥有与你不同感知机制的意识，根本不知道我们那著名的蓝色沙发。你制造了组织。你的思想感知到一种组织。你强化了这种组织，实际上也创造了它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, it can be said that you have reincarnational civilizations as well as reincarnating individuals. Each entity who is born in flesh works toward the development of those abilities that can be best nurtured and fulfilled within the physical environment. He has a responsibility to and for the civilization in which he has each existence, for he helps form it through his own thoughts, emotions, and actions.
quotes.translation: 可以说，你们既有转世的个体，也有转世的文明。每个生于肉身的实体，都致力于发展那些能在物质环境中得到最佳培育和实现的能力。他对自己所存在的每个文明都负有责任，因为他通过自己的思想、情感和行动帮助塑造了它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is not true, of course, that before the time of modern psychology man had a concept of himself that dealt with conscious exterior aspects only, although it has been written that until that time man thought of himself as a kind of flat-surfaced self -- minus, for example, subconscious or unconscious complexity.
quotes.translation: 当然，在现代心理学出现之前，人类并非只有关于意识外在层面的自我概念——尽管有记载称，直到那个时代，人类仍将自己视为一种扁平表面的自我，例如缺乏潜意识或无意识的复杂性。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: ("Connection with a circumstance not repeated, and a road." We make no connections for circumstance. Road is also too general. I thought of the long steep road leading up to the Colucci residence in the country. Marie Colucci is responsible for bringing my paintings to the attention of Dr. Lodico, as explained.
quotes.translation: （“与未重复的情境和一条道路的连接。”我们不为情境建立连接。道路也过于笼统。我想起了通往乡下科卢奇住宅的那条漫长陡峭的道路。正如解释过的，玛丽·科卢奇负责将我的画作引荐给洛迪科医生。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: These then form physical objects, physical matter. Matter is the shape that basic experience takes when it intrudes into three dimensional systems. Matter is the shape of your dreams. Your dreams, emotions, feelings, thoughts, are (underlined) transformed into physical matter purposefully by this inner self.
quotes.translation: 这些随后形成物理物体、物理物质。物质是基本经验侵入三维系统时所呈现的形态。物质是你梦想的形态。你的梦想、情绪、感受、思想，被这个内在自我有目的地转化为物理物质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The natural healing of sound can happen also when you do such a simple thing as listen to the rain. You do not need drugs, hypnotism, or even meditation. You only need to allow and direct the freedom of your conscious mind. Left alone, it will flow through thoughts and images that provide their own therapy.
quotes.translation: 当你做诸如听雨这样简单的事情时，声音的自然疗愈也能发生。你不需要药物、催眠甚至冥想。你只需要允许并引导意识心智的自由。当它不受干扰时，它会流过提供自我疗愈的思想和意象。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: These points are like invisible power plants, in other words, activated when any emotional feeling or thought of sufficient intensity comes into contact. The points themselves intensify whatever activates them in a quite neutral manner.
quotes.translation: 这些点就像无形的发电站，换言之，当任何足够强烈的情感或思想与之接触时就会被激活。这些点本身以相当中立的方式强化任何激活它们的事物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We go back to our fundamentals: You create reality through your feelings, thoughts, and mental actions. Some of these are physically materialized, others are actualized in probable systems. You are presented with an endless series of choices, it seems, at any point, some more or less favorable than others.
quotes.translation: 我们回到基本原理：你通过感受、思想和心智行动创造实相。其中一些在物理上物质化，另一些在可能系统中实现。在任何时刻，你似乎都面临无穷无尽的选择，有些比另一些更有利或更不利。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. If another individual under the same circumstances comes across the same potential object, he can also perceive it as you did. He may however, because of his own makeup, perceive and translate another portion of allied pattern. He may see the form of the man who originated the thought of the building.
quotes.translation: 现在。如果另一个个体在相同情境下遇到同一个潜在物体，他也能像你一样感知到它。然而，由于他自身的构成，他可能会感知并翻译另一部分关联模式。他或许会看见那个产生建筑念头的人的形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Ruburt will learn very quickly through such practice. It must be remembered that this is new to him, and upon occasion he must distinguish between my communications and his own thoughts. This sort of practice will be most beneficial, and though he may not think so consciously it will build his confidence.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏通过这样的练习会学得很快。必须记住这对他是全新的，有时他必须区分我的通讯和他自己的念头。这类练习将非常有益，虽然他可能不这么有意识地认为，但这会建立他的信心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: For these thoughts set up charges that oftentimes cannot be used effectively by the physical organism, and when excesses of such charges occur an illness develops. This is not to say however that illness can be treated using electromagnetics though in the future, the distant future, this may be practical.
quotes.translation: 因为这些念头建立的电荷往往无法被肉体有机体有效利用，当这类电荷过剩时，疾病就会发展。但这并不是说可以用电磁学来治疗疾病，尽管在未来，遥远的未来，这可能会成为现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When dream elements combine to cloud a projection, this is the work of a certain level of consciousness, trying to interpret the strange conditions. This usually occurs at certain levels where consciousness is not yet completely free of the physical body. Some of the dream elements will be thought forms.
quotes.translation: 当梦境元素结合而遮蔽投射时，这是某个意识层次在试图解释陌生状况。这通常发生在意识尚未完全脱离肉体的某些层次。有些梦境元素会是思想形相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You may occasionally employ the association of ideas, one thought leading easily to another. When you do this you often perceive new insights. As the events fall apart from time continuity in your mind they seem to take on fresh vitality. You have unstructured them, you see, from the usual organization.
quotes.translation: 你偶尔可以运用观念的联想，一个念头自然引向另一个。当你这样做时，你常常会感知到新的洞见。当事件在你心中脱离时间连续性时，它们似乎获得了新的活力。你看，你已经将它们从惯常的组织中解构了。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Sense images are built up, you see, in the same manner whether or not you are trying to perceive an apple, a star, or a human being. They are built up in the same manner whether or not you want to perceive a thought that must be made physical, or the image of a consciousness that must be made physical.
quotes.translation: 感官影像的构建方式，你看，无论你试图感知一个苹果、一颗星星还是一个人，都是相同的。无论你想感知一个必须物质化的念头，还是一个必须物质化的意识影像，其构建方式也都相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They learn from you almost through a process of osmosis. Dimly through many cycles of such activities, they become aware of the existence of conceptual thought. At the same time they support you. The capsule comprehension within them will evolve more and more toward the direction of conscious endeavor.
quotes.translation: 它们几乎通过一种渗透作用向你学习。在多次这样的活动循环中，它们隐约意识到概念性思维的存在。同时它们支持着你。它们内在的胶囊式理解将越来越朝着有意识努力的方向进化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now there is no doubt that you cause your dream environment as you cause your physical environment. As I have told you negative patterns of thought are reflected in both states. Proper suggestion before sleep can doubly work to your advantage then, for you are holding your ground in two worlds at once.
quotes.translation: 现在毫无疑问，你创造你的梦境环境，就像你创造你的物质环境一样。正如我告诉过你的，负面思维模式在这两种状态中都会得到反映。睡前的适当暗示可以加倍对你有利，因为你同时坚守在两个世界的阵地中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Imaginatively you may see the next bill coming, with you unable to pay it. "I will have enough money," you say. "This is my new belief." But nothing changes so you think, "My conscious thoughts mean nothing." Yet upon examination of your beliefs you may find a deep conviction of your own unworthiness.
quotes.translation: 在想象中，你可能会看到下一张账单到来，而你无力支付。"我会有足够的钱，"你说。"这是我的新信念。"但什么也没有改变，于是你想："我的有意识思维毫无意义。"然而在审视你的信念时，你可能会发现一种根深蒂固的自我不配感。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It constantly expands, as does your own universe. It is never static. From it you choose those patterns of thought which you will weave into the physical matter of your universe. The dreaming self sees both fields, and operates in each. It should be realized that the probable self also has its dreams.
quotes.translation: 它不断扩展，正如你自己的宇宙一样。它从不静止。你从中选择那些思维模式，将它们编织进你宇宙的物质实相中。做梦的自我能看见两个领域，并在其中运作。应该认识到，可能的自我也有它的梦境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You will never find a first action, and only within your system does such a search have any meaning. You form the reality, the shape, of thoughts, for they have shape, in much the same way that you breathe; and you have as little control of them, once you have created them, as you have of your breath.
quotes.translation: 你永远找不到第一个行动，只有在你自己的系统中这种寻找才有意义。你形成思想的实相和形状，因为思想确实有形状，就像你呼吸一样自然；一旦你创造了它们，你对它们的控制力就和你对呼吸的控制力一样微弱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: In the same way in the midst of life, you dwell with so-called ghosts and apparitions, and for that matter you yourselves appear as apparitions to others, particularly when you send strong thought-forms of yourself from the sleep state, or even when unconsciously you travel out of your physical body.
quotes.translation: 同样地，在生命过程中，你与所谓的鬼魂和幻影共存，就此而言，你们自己也作为幻影出现在他人面前，尤其是当你从睡眠状态发送出强烈的思想形相时，甚至当你在无意识中离开你的物质身体时。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The only way out of it is to become aware of your beliefs, aware of your own conscious thought, and to change your beliefs so that you bring them more in line with the kind of reality you want to experience. Imagination and emotion will then automatically come into play to reinforce the new beliefs.
quotes.translation: 摆脱困境的唯一方法是觉察你的信念，觉察你有意识的思维，并改变你的信念，使它们更符合你想要体验的那种实相。想象力和情感随后会自动发挥作用，强化新的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you pursue such sorrowful thoughts persistently you are reactivating that body condition. Think of one of the most pleasant events that ever happened to you and the reverse will be true, but the process is the same. This time the associated memories are pleasant, and the body changes accordingly.
quotes.translation: 如果你持续执着于这些悲伤的想法，你就是在重新激活那种身体状况。回想你经历过的最愉快的事件之一，情况就会相反，但过程是一样的。这次相关的记忆是愉快的，身体也会相应地发生变化。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You must understand, again, that your ideas and thoughts do not exist as phantoms or shadow images without substance. They are electromagnetic realities. They affect your physical being and they are automatically translated by your nervous system into the stuff of your flesh and of your experience.
quotes.translation: 你必须再次明白，你的观念和思想并非虚无缥缈、没有实质的幻影或阴影形象。它们是电磁实相。它们影响你的物质存在，并被你的神经系统自动转化为你血肉和经验的实质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Whether or not A, the sender, knowingly transmits this apparent duplicate, at the point of its transmission the sender forms an electrical impulse pattern that is supposed to duplicate the original thought. But no such identical duplication is possible, as far as I know, within reality of any kind.
quotes.translation: 无论发送者A是否有意识地传送这个看似相同的副本，在传送的那一刻，发送者会形成一个电脉冲模式，意图复制原始思想。但据我所知，在任何实相中，都不可能存在完全相同的复制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must either accept your situation as it is, change it, or at least feel that you have the ability to change it. You feared that you did not have the ability as things stand. (Long pause.) you thought that you would not advance. You feared, and do, that changing your job would deny your family.
quotes.translation: 你必须要么接受现状，要么改变它，或者至少感觉自己有能力改变它。你曾担心自己目前没有这个能力。（长停顿。）你曾认为自己不会进步。你曾担心，并且现在仍担心，换工作会辜负你的家人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: He is face to face with himself, with his abilities, ambitions and limitations, now, with a whole day more or less to work toward his goal, and he feels great urgency. This is fine, a driving force, but his strength comes from among other things his very personal involvement with nature, and from his contemplation of it. Time devoted to what appears aimless thought and speculation will also bear its fruits.
quotes.translation: 他现在直面自己，面对自己的能力、雄心和局限，现在，有整整一天的时间或多或少地朝着目标努力，他感到非常紧迫。这很好，是一种驱动力，但他的力量来源之一是他与自然的个人化交融，以及他对自然的沉思。花在看似漫无目的的思想和思辨上的时间，也会结出果实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It may be thought of in an analogy, as a shadow, in that you create it or project it, but without conscious knowledge. It is a natural consequence of your own existence. But it does not vanish when the ego blots out the inner light from the whole self. Its existence is as permanent as your own.
quotes.translation: 这可以类比为影子——你创造或投射它，却毫无自觉意识。它是你自身存在的自然结果。但当自我遮蔽了整体自性的内在光明时，它并不会消失。它的存在与你自身一样恒久。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The word "result," you see, automatically infers cause and effect -- the cause happening before the effect, and this is simply one small example of the strength of such distortions, and of the inherent difficulties involved with verbal thought, for it always implies a single-line delineation.
quotes.translation: 你看，"结果"这个词自动暗示了因果关系——原因发生在结果之前，而这仅仅是此类扭曲力量的一个小例子，也体现了言语思维固有的困境，因为它总是暗示着单线式的描绘。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In terms of Ruburt's condition, he often thinks that he is "faced with the evidence" that his condition is not improving, that it is growing worse, that all the evidence says such conditions do deteriorate rather than improve. He sometimes thinks that he is being realistic with such thoughts.
quotes.translation: 就鲁柏的状况而言，他常认为自己"面对证据"显示他的情况并未改善，反而日益恶化，所有证据都表明这类状况只会恶化而非好转。他有时认为这种想法是现实的。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth speaks in Session 826, held for Mass Events on March 8, 1978:

quotes.text: The psychological alterations are miraculous, and so swift that you could not follow them. The smallest thought alters chemical and electromagnetic changes in the body that directly affect the structure of the immediate physical universe. In the dream state the alterations are even stronger.
quotes.translation: 心理层面的改变是奇迹般的，其速度之快你根本无法追踪。最微小的念头都会改变体内的化学与电磁变化，直接影响物质宇宙的即时结构。在梦境状态中，这些改变甚至更为强烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: When our sessions first began, I thought of publishing the material as my own, so that it could be accepted for its value, without introducing questions about its source. This did not seem just, however, because the way the Seth material is produced is part of the message and reinforces it.
quotes.translation: 当我们的课程刚开始时，我曾考虑以我自己的名义出版这些资料，这样就能因其价值而被接受，无需引入关于其来源的疑问。但这似乎并不公平，因为赛斯资料的产生方式本身就是讯息的一部分，并强化了讯息本身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: Give some thought to experimentation, observing the nature of color in usual consciousness and in altered states. Pay attention to color in your dreams also. You should go into your own ideas about the people you paint, and why, being fascinated with portraits, you often do not use models.
quotes.translation: 请花些心思进行实验，观察颜色在寻常意识状态与改变状态中的本质。也要留意梦境中的颜色。你应该深入探索自己对所画人物的看法，以及为何你痴迷于肖像画却常常不使用模特。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. (With dry humor again:) Before my comments for Ruburt: I thought my risqué remark about "no holes barred" was quite in keeping with the content of such material. It is difficult to be prissy when discussing such a topic -- but if you feel that others might be offended, do as you wish.
quotes.translation: 现在。（再次带着冷幽默：）在我对鲁柏的评论之前：我以为我那句关于“毫无禁忌”的轻率言论与这类材料的内容相当契合。讨论这种话题时很难装正经——但如果你觉得别人可能会被冒犯，那就随你便吧。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: （I did not write it down earlier, but we thought Seth had referred to the home of my parents and the house next door. The connection is far-out: My brother, father of the Protestant bride who married a Catholic, was at my parents' home Sunday; the people who live next door are Catholic.
quotes.translation: （我之前没有写下来，但我们以为赛斯指的是我父母的家和隔壁的房子。这联系很牵强：我哥哥，那位嫁给天主教徒的新教新娘的父亲，周日在我父母家；住在隔壁的人是天主教徒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

source_raw.title: A disagreement here somewhere, in connection with two men. This is not the disagreement that Dr. Instream spoke of to you and Ruburt when you met. （Pause at 10:15. See Session 169 in Volume 4.）

quotes.text: It plays hopscotch in and out of reality. It is gone sometimes and you are not aware of it. On such occasions your attention is focused elsewhere, in what you might call mini-dreams or hallucinations, or associative and intuitive processes of thought that go quite beyond normal focus.
quotes.translation: 它在现实之间跳来跳去。有时它消失了，而你并未察觉。在这种时候，你的注意力集中在别处，在那些你称之为迷你梦境或幻觉的东西上，或是在那些完全超越正常焦点的联想性和直觉性思维过程中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is a mistake to assume that any future or inevitable merging with a life force is ahead of you, in those terms. This is an error that is precisely due to that which Priestley himself abhors: distortions in thought caused by reliance upon the concept of time as a series of moments.
quotes.translation: 认为任何未来或必然与生命力的融合就在前方，以那些术语来说，这是个错误。这恰恰是普里斯特利本人所憎恶的那种错误：由于依赖时间作为一系列时刻的概念而导致的思想扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Before that time man did believe that he could affect matter and the environment through his thoughts. With the Industrial Revolution, however, even the elements of nature lost their living quality in man's eyes. They became objects to be categorized, named, torn apart and examined.
quotes.translation: 在那之前，人类确实相信他们可以通过思想影响物质和环境。然而，随着工业革命，即使在人类眼中，自然元素也失去了它们的生命特质。它们变成了被分类、命名、拆解和检验的对象。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The body is obviously continually created during your present lifetime, in your terms. It is not a mechanism once created, then left to fend for itself. You were not given a certain amount of "life force" at birth that you use up as you go along, contrary to many schools of thought.
quotes.translation: 身体显然是在你当前的生命期间不断被创造的，用你的话说。它不是一个一旦被创造就任其自生自灭的机制。与许多思想流派相反，你并非在出生时被赋予一定量的“生命力”，然后随着时间流逝而消耗殆尽。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now: Often you are taught not only to repress verbal expression of hate, but also told that hateful thoughts are as bad as hateful actions.
quotes.translation: 现在：你们常被教导不仅要压抑仇恨的言语表达，还被告知仇恨的念头与仇恨的行为同样恶劣。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Another thought here is the love of continuing creation, which is continually formed by, through, and because of inquiring consciousness. It, inquiring consciousness, is as you know always individualized, and it is because of this amazing diversity that so many forms are possible.
quotes.translation: 此处另一个念头是对持续创造的热爱，这种创造由、通过、并因探索意识而不断形成。如你所知，探索意识始终个体化，正是由于这惊人的多样性，才使得如此多的形态成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you have done the same, speak to me again on the same matters. I have not been placing any blame on anyone. I thought I was explaining the simple mechanics involved. In other words you protest too loudly.
quotes.translation: 当你完成同样的事后，再就相同议题与我交谈。我从未指责任何人。我以为自己只是在解释其中涉及的简单机制。换言之，你的抗议过于激烈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As many quite real phenomena cannot be seen by your eyes, so with your outer senses you cannot perceive these constant departures of quality-energy from the self into what seems to be not-self. These energies, these thoughts and wishes, travel. They pass through physical matter.
quotes.translation: 正如许多真实存在的现象无法被肉眼所见，你们的外在感官也无法感知这些从自我持续流向看似非我之物的品质能量。这些能量、这些念头与愿望会旅行。它们穿越物质实体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Emotional charged feeling immediately sets up what you may think of as a tangent. It is expressed in some reality system. This is the inner nature of action. Those inner thoughts or desires, impulses not made physically real in your terms, will be made real within other systems.
quotes.translation: 情绪化的感受会立即建立你们可视为切线的东西。它在某个实相系统中被表达。这是行动的内在本质。那些内在念头或欲望、在你们术语中未物质化的冲动，将在其他系统中成为现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now: This does not mean that you will necessarily have a flood of reincarnational information, instant intuitive recognition of "past" lives, or experience any such intrusive data. It does mean that in your own life such information automatically appears in intimate ways, but couched within the framework of your own comprehensions, even passing unobtrusively through your conscious thoughts.
quotes.translation: 现在：这并不意味着你必然会涌现大量转世信息、瞬间直觉认出"过去"世，或经历任何此类侵入性数据。它确实意味着在你自己的生命中，这类信息会以亲密方式自动显现，但包裹在你自身理解的框架内，甚至悄然穿过你的意识思维。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Any art form touches the generations. Karma can be worked out in many ways, and here again we return to Mark's earlier male oriented, aggressive personality. This time, through the creation of beauty in paintings, he more than makes up for past errors; not only because paintings certainly should possess beauty, but because they instill positive creative thoughts in the mind of the beholder.
quotes.translation: 任何艺术形式都能触动世代。业力可以通过多种方式化解，这里我们再次回到马克早期男性导向、侵略性的人格特质。这次通过绘画创造美，他不仅弥补了过去的错误——因为画作当然应该具备美感，更因为它们在观者心中播下积极创造的思绪。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, the process does not cease at the physical boundaries of the self however. The data thus far has been seen as traveling from the inner self outward, as being translated from pure knowledge into thermal pictures, inner images and thoughts. Obviously words and action follow.
quotes.translation: 然而这个过程并未止于自我的物理边界。截至目前，我们看到数据从内在自我向外流动，从纯粹知识转化为热成像、内在影像与思绪。显然，言语与行动随之而来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I had thought of going into that matter this evening. (Pause.) Give us moment. The main focus in his work will now begin to show itself. There was resistance against it in the past. It will involve this material. United with the unique nature of Ruburt's own writing abilities.
quotes.translation: 我原想今晚探讨此事。（停顿）请稍候。他作品的主要焦点即将显现。过去曾存在抗拒，这将涉及这些资料，并与鲁柏独特的写作天赋相结合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Those who have left it have evolved into the mental entities that they always were, you see. They have discarded material form. This group of entities still takes a great interest in earth. They lend it support and energy. In a way, they could be thought of now as earth gods.
quotes.translation: 那些离开者已进化为他们始终是的灵性实体，你看。他们舍弃了物质形态。这群实体仍对地球怀有浓厚兴趣，给予支持与能量。从某种角度说，他们现在可被视为地神。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Never think of it as static. There is constant give and take between all portions of the self, and the entity changes as it interacts with other levels of the personality. Any given thought experienced by you is experienced by all possible yourselves, though in various forms.
quotes.translation: 切勿视其为静止。自我各部分之间持续进行着给予与索取，实体在与人格其他层面互动时不断变化。你所体验的任何思绪，都被所有可能的自我以不同形式所体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I am primarily a teacher, but I have not been a man of letters per se. I am primarily a personality with a message: you create the world that you know. You have been given perhaps the most awesome gift of all: the ability to project your thoughts outward into physical form.
quotes.translation: 我主要是位教师，但并非纯粹的文人。我主要是个带着讯息的人格：你创造你所认知的世界。你被赐予或许是最令人敬畏的天赋：将思绪投射为物质形态的能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will discuss our dream material for a short while, for it is important that you understand it. For in the same way that dream images are projected outward from the personality, so also are thoughts projected, and all influences that extend from one personality to another.
quotes.translation: 我将简短讨论你们的梦境材料，因为理解它很重要。正如梦境影像从人格向外投射，思想也是如此投射，所有从一个人格延伸到另一个人格的影响亦然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: （I joked that I thought "A black and white photo." meant the wallet identification card had been placed next to a photo in the wallet. There is a "Stubbing of the toe." incident in my brother Lorens family--one of a humorous nature that has become kind of a standing joke.
quotes.translation: （我开玩笑说，我以为"一张黑白照片"指的是钱包里的身份证件照被放在钱包里另一张照片旁边。我兄弟洛伦家发生过一件"踢到脚趾"的趣事——一件带有幽默性质的事，后来成了个经典笑话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is natural to live after death, and natural to return the body to earth and [then to] form another. It is natural for your thoughts to be as quick, responsive, and alive as viruses. It is natural for you to have probable selves as well as reincarnational existences.*
quotes.translation: 死后继续存在是自然的，将身体归还大地再形成另一具身体也是自然的。你们的思想像病毒一样敏捷、有反应、充满活力是自然的。你们拥有可能的自己以及转世存在也是自然的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now this is the difference between repression and positive action. In repression the resentment is shoved beneath and ignored. With our method it is recognized, imaginatively plucked out as being undesirable, and replaced by the thought of peace and constructive energy.
quotes.translation: 这就是压抑与积极行动的区别。在压抑中，怨恨被压到下面并忽视。用我们的方法，它被识别出来，想象性地被当作不受欢迎之物拔除，并被和平与建设性能量的思想所取代。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... A stone's physical shadow will faithfully mirror its form. In those terms, little creativity is allowed it. Far greater leeway exists, however, as a thought or feeling in the dream world casts its greater shadow out upon the landscape of the mind.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……石头的物理阴影会忠实地映照它的形状。用那些术语来说，它几乎不被允许有任何创造力。然而，在梦境世界中，思想或情感将其更大的阴影投射在心灵景观上时，存在着远为更大的余地。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Mankind thought that killing worked. It was the most practical solution, or so it seemed, to many problems. You know now that killing is not practical, since it is being brought home to you in a very practical manner that in the long run he who kills will not survive.
quotes.translation: 人类曾以为杀戮有效。它曾是许多问题最实际的解决方案，或看起来如此。现在你们知道杀戮并不实际，因为你们正以一种非常实际的方式被明白：从长远来看，杀人者将无法存活。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is caused by the culmination of negative suggestions and of negative thought. They build up until you can take it no longer. In the natural state of affairs, however, sooner or later, some highly charged positive suggestion then begins to clear the Emotional air.
quotes.translation: 这是由于负面暗示和负面思想的累积所致。它们不断堆积，直到你再也无法承受。然而在自然状态下，迟早会有某个高度集中的正面暗示开始净化情绪氛围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

source_raw.title: (10:37. Janes pace was much faster the latter part of the session. Her eyes were mostly closed; voice average. See Jane's Malba notes in session 16, Volume 1.)

quotes.text: He will help you in your out of body episodes. And show you what he knows. Then you will have your own methods, and will be able to return the help as you share your experience. You have also been sending thought forms out--and this is different, than an astral image.
quotes.translation: 他会在你的出体经历中协助你，并展示他所知的一切。届时你将拥有自己的方法，并能在分享经验时回报这份帮助。你也在持续发送思想形态——这与星体投射影像截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I, who am the source (pause), sent a portion of myself, an independent portion, to you. Seth as you then thought of him, was far more than a delivery boy however, for it was his peculiar personality, and his particular qualities, which gave the material life for you.
quotes.translation: 我，作为源头（停顿），将自身的一部分——一个独立的片段——投射给你。然而你当时所认知的赛斯远非单纯的传递者，正是他独特的个性与特质，为你们赋予了鲜活的资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is easier then for similar thoughts to follow. So in a larger sense , as personalities leave your system, as they travel into other dimensions, they also set up electrical pathways, and each personality who does so makes those paths easier for others. Do you see?
quotes.translation: 因此相似的思想更容易相继出现。从更宏观的角度看，当人格离开你们的系统进入其他维度时，它们也会建立电磁路径，每个这样做的人格都会为后来者铺平道路。你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A thought is an action. A dream is as much an action as a breath is an action. Although we speak in terms of separation, all reality is a part of action. When we divide action in order to discuss it, we in no way change the reality of action, nor alter its nature.
quotes.translation: 思想即行动。梦境与呼吸一样，都是行动。尽管我们以分离的术语讨论，但所有实相都是行动的一部分。当我们为了讨论而分割行动时，既未改变行动的真实性，也未改变其本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This psychological framework obviously must be receptive. It must also be formed by portions of my own essence, and by portions of Ruburt's personality. It can be thought of almost as a psychological protrusion, though this is not precisely the word to explain it.
quotes.translation: 这个心理框架显然必须具有接收性。它必须由我本质的部分与鲁柏人格的部分共同构成。这几乎可被视为一种心理延伸——尽管这个词汇并不完全精确。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is both the creative and aggressive aspects of consciousness that allow it to use symbols, to move through various levels of experience, and the aggressive nature of thought that so propels it, despite your knowledge, into realities that you do not understand.
quotes.translation: 正是意识中创造性与攻击性的双重面向，使其得以运用符号、穿越不同经验层次，而思想的攻击性本质如此强烈地推动它——即便在你不知情时——进入你所不理解的真实领域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Males who are creatively gifted find themselves in some dilemma, for their rich, sensed creativity comes into direct conflict with their ideas of virility. Women who possess characteristics that are thought to be masculine have the same problem on the other side.
quotes.translation: 具有创造天赋的男性常陷入两难困境，因为他们丰沛敏锐的创造力与自身对阳刚气概的认知产生直接冲突。而拥有所谓男性特质女性，则在另一极面临相同困境。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In for example the worm, the process ends here. In so-called higher forms, the chemical process itself allows for the creation of an ordinary image. This brings about further thermal responses and chemical alterations, that allow the thought processes to proceed.
quotes.translation: 以蠕虫为例，此过程在此终结。在所谓高等生物中，化学过程本身允许普通意象的生成，这引发进一步的热反应与化学变化，使思维过程得以延续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In those days neither did a sane, righteous man give thought to sharing his wealth, or even consider the plight of the poorer classes. Not only was charity not given, its practical nature was not considered. The archaic concept of God nicely covered such matters.
quotes.translation: 彼时，既无清醒正直之人会考虑分享财富，更无人关注贫苦阶层的困境。不仅慈善无人践行，其实际价值亦被忽视。古老的上帝概念恰如其分地掩盖了此类问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The soul is not frightened for its identity. It is sure of itself. It ever seeks. It is not afraid of being overwhelmed by experience or perception. If you had a more thorough understanding of the nature of identity you would not, for example, fear telepathy, for behind this concern is the worry that your identity will be swept away by the suggestions or thoughts of others.
quotes.translation: 灵魂从不恐惧自身存续。它确信自我，永恒追寻。它不畏惧被经验或感知淹没。若你更透彻理解身份的本质，便不会恐惧心灵感应——因为这种担忧背后，是害怕你的身份会被他人的暗示或思想冲垮。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Let us make a clear distinction here: Your conscious beliefs direct the flow of unconscious processes which bring your ideas into physical reality, so while your thoughts cause your experience, you are not consciously aware of how this takes place (forcefully).
quotes.translation: 让我们在此明确区分：你的意识信念引导着无意识过程的流向，这些过程将你的想法转化为物质实相。因此，虽然你的思想造就了你的经验，但你并未有意识地觉察这如何发生（强调语气）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: If you have questions, I shall answer them but all of this is meant to show you that reality is more than you thought reality to be... I am not here as the host of a party. I am not here for your amusement or pleasure. I am here for your education and training.
quotes.translation: 若你有疑问，我自会回答，但这一切旨在向你展示，实相远比你所以为的更为广阔……我并非以派对主人的身份而来，亦非为你的消遣或娱乐而来。我在此是为了你的教育与训练。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: ... But your thoughts also have a reality that you do not know. They have a reality that you do not perceive. Now I am going to give you a quickie course. The atoms and the molecules in this chair, you see, and in our friends camera, all have a consciousness...
quotes.translation: ……然而，你的思想也拥有你所不知的实相。它们具有你未能感知的实相。现在我将为你速成一课：你看，这把椅子中的原子与分子，以及我们朋友相机中的原子与分子，皆具有意识……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Because the entity has not expressed but withheld the basic femininity of its nature, it has fed back upon itself so that the overall identity of the entity appears as feminine simply because there is a backlog of those characteristics thought of as feminine.
quotes.translation: 由于该存有未曾表达却压抑了其本质中的基本阴性特质，它便反噬自身，使得该存有的整体身份呈现为阴性，仅仅是因为那些被视为阴性的特质积压成堆。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Reach out to the idea intuitively. Do not be afraid of or reject unfamiliar bodily sensations. With practice, and to a very limited degree, you will find that you can become the idea. You will be inside the idea, looking out, not looking in. This is thought.
quotes.translation: 凭直觉去触及那个观念。不要害怕或排斥陌生的身体感受。经过练习，并在极其有限的程度上，你会发现你能成为那个观念。你将置身于观念之内，向外观看，而非向内审视。这就是思想。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: （See the tracing of the test object on page 190. As can be seen practically none of the data applies to the test object, with the exception of the white coat; the connection here is tenuous, and will be explained. I thought "November" might be correct also.
quotes.translation: （参见第190页测试对象的描摹图。如图所示，除了白色外套外，几乎没有任何数据适用于测试对象；此处的关联性很薄弱，将予以解释。我曾以为"十一月"或许也是正确的。）

quotes.text: These psychic entities are real, however. It is quite true to say that their reality consists not only of the core of their own identity, but also is reinforced by those projected thoughts and feelings of the earthly audience for whom the drama is enacted.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些心灵实体是真实的。完全可以这样说，它们的实相不仅包含其自身身份的核心，还因那些为戏剧上演的人间观众所投射的思想与感受而得到强化。

quotes.text: （"Squares." I thought this a reference to the form in which we received the vaccine on both occasions. See the sketch on page 51. We were each given a small cube--the squares--of pink sugar, containing the vaccine, and we let them dissolve on our tongues.
quotes.translation: “方块。”我以为这指的是我们两次接种疫苗时所使用的形式。参见第51页的草图。我们每人得到一小块粉红色的方糖——也就是方块——里面含有疫苗，然后让它们在舌头上融化。

quotes.text: All of these forms, however, are you understand spontaneous and instantaneous. In the same way that an idea may appear within your system as a thought, a mental image, a dream picture or as a physical object, so does any action event appear in many forms.
quotes.translation: 然而，所有这些形式，你要明白，都是自发且瞬间产生的。就像同一个想法可能在你的系统内以思想、心象、梦境画面或实物形式出现一样，任何行动事件也会以多种形式呈现。

quotes.text: I wanted to go into the invention of the soul, using mankind's own terminology, the soul and the spirit being thought of as one and the same thing. The duality of which we spoke is mainly artificial. It is stronger in more so- called advanced societies.
quotes.translation: 我想探讨灵魂的发明，使用人类自己的术语，灵魂和灵性被视为同一回事。我们所说的二元性主要是人为的。在所谓更先进的社会中，这种二元性更为强烈。

quotes.text: （The last few paragraphs of the above material we thought to be an elaboration of Seth's rather cryptic statement in the 97th session, page 72, to the effect that in some respects all planes or fields of existence are indeed by-products of others.
quotes.translation: （我们认为上述材料的最后几段是对赛斯在第97节课（第72页）中相当隐晦的陈述的详细阐述，大意是：在某些方面，所有存在层面或领域确实是其他层面的副产品。）

quotes.text: Ruburt, on one occasion, created a window thought form on the blank wall through which he actually flew, simply because he held fears and could not imagine going through a solid wall. He saw the window, incidentally, as opened, you see. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 鲁柏有一次在空白的墙壁上创造了一个窗户思想形态，他实际上从这扇窗户飞了出去，仅仅因为他心怀恐惧，无法想象自己能穿过一堵实心的墙。顺便说一句，他看到窗户是开着的，你明白吗。（停顿。）

quotes.text: Thoughts are psych electric patterns, set up by the mind, and transformed to human codes by the brain.
quotes.translation: 思想是由心智建立的心理电模式，并由大脑转化为人类编码。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The sound, light, and electromagnetic patterns give strength and vitality to the physical form that you recognize. They are more mobile than the physical body, and even more susceptible to the changing pattern of your own thought and emotion.
quotes.translation: 声音、光线与电磁模式赋予你所认知的肉体形态力量与活力。它们比肉体更具流动性，甚至更易受你自身思想与情绪变化模式的影响。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: Now: You are the living picture of yourself. You project what you think you are outward into flesh. Your feelings, your conscious and unconscious thoughts, all alter and form your physical image. This is fairly easy for you to understand.
quotes.translation: 现在：你是自己活生生的画像。你将自认为的模样向外投射为血肉之躯。你的感受、意识与潜意识思想，都在改变并塑造你的形体形象。这对你而言相当容易理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: He does not interpret the thought. He interprets its meaning, and forms a new thought identity.
quotes.translation: 他并非诠释思想本身，而是诠释其意义，并形成新的思想身份。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is not as easy, however, to realize that your feelings and thoughts form your exterior experience in the same way, or that the events that appear to happen to you are initiated by you within your mental or psychic inner environment.
quotes.translation: 然而，要认识到你的感受与思想以同样方式塑造外在经验，或看似发生在你身上的事件皆由你内在心灵环境所引发，则并非易事。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality

quotes.text: The episode did involve projection, mainly through intensities. These intensities you interpret as time and space. Now in a different kind of projection, you could face for example the girl's thought forms as a pseudo physical reality.
quotes.translation: 该事件确实涉及投射，主要通过强度进行。这些强度被你诠释为时间与空间。而在另一种投射中，你可能会面对例如那女孩的思想形态，将其视为伪物理实相。

quotes.text: You will end up with, if all goes well, a kind of "new" illuminated consciousness, an intellect who realizes that the source of its own light is not itself, but comes from the spontaneous power that provides the fuel for its thoughts.
quotes.translation: 若一切顺利，你终将获得某种"崭新"的启明意识——一种认识到自身光芒之源并非自我，而是来自为其思想提供燃料的自发性力量的智慧。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: You thought you would settle down and paint on your fine farm, but instead you turned into a farmer, and a lecherous one at that. There is some connection here with your ambiguous feelings about money now, you see, and possessions.
quotes.translation: 你以为自己会安定下来，在美好的农场上作画，结果却变成了农夫，还是个淫荡的农夫。这与你现在对金钱和财产那种模棱两可的感觉有关，你明白吗。

quotes.text: Thought takes time, and exists by virtue of cellular composition. Consciousness not focused in cellular construction involves itself with a kind of direct cognition, involving comprehensions that come in a more circular fashion.
quotes.translation: 思想需要时间，并借由细胞结构而存在。不聚焦于细胞结构的意识，则涉及一种直接认知，包含以更循环方式到来的理解。

quotes.text: I did not intend to go into this any more deeply tonight but it is rather interesting. And he thought he had a foolproof method of gratification, a gratification that seemed to bring no penalties as with overeating and so forth.
quotes.translation: 我今晚本不打算深入探讨这个，但这确实相当有趣。而他以为自己找到了一种万无一失的满足方法，一种似乎不会像暴饮暴食那样带来惩罚的满足。

quotes.text: In your society, it is generally thought that a person must have a decent livelihood, a family or other close relationships, good health, and a sense of belonging if the individual is to be at all productive, happy, or content.
quotes.translation: 在你们的社会里，普遍认为一个人必须拥有体面的生计、家庭或其他亲密关系、健康的身体以及归属感，才能算得上富有成效、快乐或满足。

quotes.translation: 现在让我们回到奥古斯都；因为在这里，我们再次在一个个体身上看到了看似非实相的思想和信念如何影响并改变肉体形象的绝佳范例。你们可以休息一下。

quotes.text: Your thoughts are the reality. Do you have questions? You may indeed speak up.

quotes.text: As hinted, there have been all kinds of species of animal-man, and man-animal, of which your sciences are not aware, and bones found thought to form, say, a man and an animal that were from the same creature. Afgastan --
quotes.translation: 如前所述，曾有各种人形动物与动物形人的物种存在，你们的科学对此一无所知，而那些被认为属于同一生物的人与动物骨骼化石，便是明证。阿法斯坦——

quotes.text: Negative thoughts running rampant do cause infections. Negative suggestions however can also keep them going. I suggest that Ruburt concentrate as much as possible on his work, even in his psycho cybernetics exercises.
quotes.translation: 失控的负面思想确实会引发感染。然而负面暗示也能使其持续。我建议鲁柏尽可能专注于他的工作，即便是在进行心理控制训练时也应如此。

quotes.text: Ruburt picked up the Florida connection, and this led him to think of his photograph. I always distinguish between our lines of thought when this happens. We will perhaps discuss this sort of test at our next session.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏捕捉到了佛罗里达的关联，这让他联想到自己的照片。每当这种情况发生时，我始终能区分我们各自的思想脉络。或许我们下次课程可以讨论这类测试。

source_raw.title: See the opening notes for Session 918, which Jane held on June 2 for Chapter 8 of Dreams. I referred to the strong local opposition to venting radioactive krypton gas from the contaminated containment building at Three Mile Island. An estimated several thousand people, not trusting the credibility of statements about safety that had been made by federal and private officials, left the area before company technicians finally began the long-delayed venting on June 29. All went well: The radiation released into the atmosphere was far below permissible limits. Surprisingly, the procedure was completed in only 13 days--considerably less than the estimated three to four weeks required for the job. The still-wary populace returned. Twelve days after the venting was completed, two engineers from TMI entered the enormous containment building on the first brief inspection trip to gather photographic, radiation, and other data.

quotes.text: I am not telling you to inhibit thoughts or feelings. I am asking that you become aware of those you have. Realize that they form your reality. Concentrate upon those that give you the results that you want.
quotes.translation: 我并非要你压抑思想或感受。我是要求你觉察自己所拥有的那些。要明白它们构成了你的实相。专注于那些能带给你想要结果的思想。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now: The animals do have imagination, regardless of your current thought. Yet man is so gifted that he directs his experience and forms his civilizations largely through the use of his imaginative abilities.
quotes.translation: 现在：动物确实拥有想象力，无论你们当前的想法如何。然而人类天赋异禀，以至于他主要通过运用自己的想象能力来引导经验并构建文明。

quotes.text: Christ meant, "You form your own reality. Those who think thoughts of peace will find themselves safe from war and dissension. They will be untouched by it. They will escape, and indeed inherit the earth."

quotes.text: Ruburt has been somewhat uneasy at the thought of a test. To some degree this may affect our results. However, the very fact that he permitted the test to be conducted shows that his attitude is improving.

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Though they probe their own universe, they will not wander into your reality. They will only perceive the shape and form that your own mental acts, thoughts and dreams take within their own system.
quotes.translation: 尽管他们探索自己的宇宙，却不会闯入你们的实相。他们只会感知到你们的心智活动、思想和梦境在自己系统内所呈现的形态与形式。

source_raw.title: Two and a half years ago I wrote in the closing notes for Session 869, in Chapter 10 of Mass Events, that she had finally received from Seth the full title for this book: Dreams, "Evolution," and Value Fulfillment. Mass Events was published eight months ago, and we have been receiving a steady flow of inquiries as to when Dreams will be issued. We're glad to try to answer questions like that, but our correspondents cover many topics and express many viewpoints--and some are hard for us to handle. As we waited for the session Jane gave me two very long letters she had received yesterday. I felt sad after reading them. We think that both writers express extreme points of view, and that both are much too adulatory of us. To answer one letter would draw its author to our doorstep at once: "I am your Seth," and: "I will visit you as soon as I hear from you." The writer of the other letter, while praising our work, is caught up in questions of conventional religion: "I keep wondering over and over again whether Seth is a demon or a deception. What do you have to say about this?" We don't feel like justifying ourselves.
